domain_results.detail: 90000 candidates narrowed to 1 (44944) by three deterministic eliminators; trail sealed
claimed finish 44944 re-confirmed HOLDS on every constraint; wrong finish 12321 refused BROKEN
212**2 == 44944 simplifies to zero (SymPy, derivation chain)

wisdom: The narrow way is found by what survives, not by what is conjured. The engine does the patient, un-copyable work of deleting every path that cannot be true, until what remains is so small a child could finish it -- and then it checks the child's work. This is why it can trust any tool: not because the tool is wise, but because the gate is narrow and the finish is tested. 'Enter by the narrow gate... the way is hard that leads to life, and those who find it are few' (Matthew 7:13-14). We do not widen the gate to make the work easy; we clear the path to the gate so the last step is light.

title: Quantum, narrowed and verified -- the moat rides a physical law
situation: Eight proposed qubit states were put to the engine. It did not guess which were real. It applied a LAW -- a valid quantum state must have amplitudes whose squared magnitudes sum to exactly 1 -- through the quantum_computing verifier, and deleted the seven that broke it. One survived: [0.6, 0.8] (0.36 + 0.64 = 1). This is a VERIFIER-BACKED eliminator: the narrowing no longer rides a local predicate (anyone's Python) but the verified substrate itself (the un-copyable moat). The engine also verified a 3-step quantum proof end to end -- the equal-superposition state |+> is normalized, its measurement carries 1 bit of von Neumann entropy, and Grover search over 64 items is optimal at 6 iterations (HOLDS 3/3) -- and REFUSED a false one: [0.6, 0.6], claimed normalized, BROKE (sum = 0.72 != 1). It never simulated a circuit; quantum mechanics has closed-form laws, and a law is an eliminator.
use: This is the moat made literal: narrowing power equals verifier coverage. A verifier-backed eliminator routes each candidate through one of the 70 verified domains and keeps only what the domain CONFIRMS -- so the narrowing is exactly as deep as the physics, the number theory, the dimensional law it can call on. The intended pattern: cheap predicates narrow the field first, then the un-copyable verifier confirms the survivors (proven on number theory too: 199 -> 27 by palindrome, 27 -> 10 by the number_theory PRIMALITY verifier, 10 -> 1 by digit-sum, answer 191). Bring a quantum claim in plain language to POST /derivation/solve, or candidate states to POST /narrow/eliminate with a quantum_computing verify-constraint; the engine eliminates what the law forbids and verifies what you finish. It never generates the answer.

pre_run.summary: Quantum as a narrowing + verification domain, proven on prod. NARROW: 8 candidate qubit states -> 1 (the normalized [0.6,0.8]) by the quantum_computing verifier enforcing sum|a|^2 = 1; trail sealed. VERIFY: a 3-step quantum derivation HOLDS 3/3 (normalization, von Neumann entropy, Grover), sealed. FAITHFULNESS: a false normalization label ([0.6,0.6] claimed normalized) BROKE. Verifier-backed eliminators were also proven on number theory (palindromic prime 191). The engine eliminated what the law forbids -- it never generated the answer (Principle B).

domain_results.detail: 8 candidate states narrowed to 1 ([0.6,0.8], norm 1) by the normalization law; trail sealed
3-step quantum derivation HOLDS 3/3 (normalization, S=1 bit, Grover T=6); false label [0.6,0.6] BROKE
verifier-backed primality eliminator: 199->27->10->1 (191), primality decided by the number_theory verifier

wisdom: The deepest part of the realm is not hidden from measure; it is measured by law. A qubit either obeys the conservation of probability or it is no state at all -- and the engine reads that law the way it reads any other, deleting what cannot be and keeping what survives. To narrow by a law you did not write is to confess that the order was there before you looked. 'He is before all things, and in him all things hold together' (Colossians 1:17). We do not invent the rules of the realm; we read them, and what they forbid, we let fall away.

title: Check your paycheck -- overtime is time-and-a-half
situation: Someone in the house worked 45 hours one week at $18.50/hour. Under the federal rule (FLSA), the first 40 hours are paid straight, and every hour past 40 is paid at one-and-a-half times the rate. So the gross is 40 x $18.50 = $740, plus 5 x ($18.50 x 1.5 = $27.75) = $138.75, for $878.75. After a 20% total withholding, take-home is $703.00. The engine confirmed both (HOLDS 2/2). It also CAUGHT the common error: if the employer pays all 45 hours at the straight rate, the check reads $832.50 -- and that BREAKS, short by exactly $46.25 of overtime owed.
use: Once a month, check a paycheck against the math -- it takes two minutes and it is the most common place families are quietly shorted. (1) Count the hours past 40; those are overtime. (2) Overtime rate = your hourly rate x 1.5. (3) Gross = (40 x rate) + (overtime hours x overtime rate). (4) Take-home = gross x (1 - your total withholding rate). If the stub paid overtime hours at the plain rate, you are owed the difference. Most U.S. hourly workers are covered; salaried, farm, and some other roles have exceptions, so check your status. The engine does not guess your pay -- give it the numbers and it tells you whether the arithmetic holds or breaks, and where.

pre_run.summary: A real paycheck, verified on prod. TRUE: 45h at $18.50 -> FLSA gross $878.75 (40 straight + 5 at 1.5x) and take-home $703.00 after 20% withholding, HOLDS 2/2, sealed. FALSE: the same hours paid all at straight time ($832.50, no overtime premium) BROKE -- short $46.25. The engine verifies the arithmetic; it does not generate the pay.

domain_results.detail: FLSA gross for 45h at $18.50 = $878.75 (40 straight + 5 at 1.5x)
straight-time claim $832.50 BROKE against the true $878.75 (short $46.25)

wisdom: Fair pay is not a favor; it is a debt, and Scripture treats withholding it as a cry that reaches heaven. To check the arithmetic of a paycheck is a small act of stewardship and of justice at once -- for yourself, and for anyone whose wages pass through your hands. 'Behold, the wages of the laborers who mowed your fields, which you kept back by fraud, are crying out' (James 5:4). Better to count carefully and owe no one, and to pay in full and on time what is owed.

title: Exponential decay is one law: a nucleus and a capacitor agree
situation: A radioactive sample and a charging capacitor have nothing physically to do with each other -- one is the strong force inside a nucleus, the other is charge flowing onto a plate. Yet two independent verifiers found them obeying the SAME curve. The nuclear_physics verifier confirmed that after 2 half-lives a sample has 25% of its nuclei left (N0 * e^(-lambda*t)). The electrical verifier confirmed that after t = R*C*ln(4) a capacitor's remaining voltage gap is 25% -- it is 75% charged (e^(-t/RC)). Both land on the SAME number because both are the first-order relaxation law e^(-t/tau), evaluated at the same dimensionless time t/tau = ln(4): the mathematics verifier confirmed e^(-ln 4) = 1/4. HOLDS 3/3, sealed. A false claim (50% remaining after 2 half-lives) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge, not an analogy (Deuteronomy 19:15 -- two witnesses). When two unrelated domains confirm the same structure on the same data, the connection between them is established, not asserted. Here it means a single idea -- exponential relaxation toward equilibrium, fall by a fixed FRACTION in each fixed interval -- is the engine behind radioactive decay, RC circuits, drug clearance from the blood, capacitor discharge, and cooling (Newton's law). Learn the curve once (after one time-constant tau, 1/e ~ 37% of the way remains; the 'half-life' is just tau*ln 2) and you hold all of them. The engine did not argue the unity; it checked it in two domains and sealed the agreement.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation, proven on prod. nuclear_physics (decay: 2 half-lives -> 25% remain) and electrical (RC: t=RC*ln4 -> 25% voltage gap, 75% charged) confirmed the SAME exponential value, anchored by mathematics (e^(-ln 4)=1/4). HOLDS 3/3, sealed; a false 50%-remaining claim BROKE. Two unrelated systems, one law e^(-t/tau).

domain_results.detail: N0*e^(-lambda*t): after 2 half-lives, 25% of nuclei remain
RC charging e^(-t/RC): after t=RC*ln4 the voltage gap is 25% (75% charged)
the shared value: e^(-ln 4) = 1/4 (both at t/tau = ln 4)

wisdom: The same fixed order runs through things that never meet: the nucleus and the circuit keep the same clock, not by agreement but because the law was laid down before either existed. To find one rule honoring two unrelated witnesses is to glimpse how few and how faithful the laws of the realm really are. 'They continue this day according to your ordinances, for all things are your servants' (Psalm 119:91). The decay obeys; we only read the rate.

title: Conservation is one principle: atoms and energy both balance
situation: Two domains were asked, separately, whether a total survives a change. The chemistry verifier confirmed that in 2 H2 + O2 -> 2 H2O every element is balanced -- the atoms present before the reaction are exactly the atoms present after (Lavoisier, 1789). The physics_conservation verifier confirmed that in a collision where kinetic and potential energy trade (KE 10 -> 8, PE 5 -> 7) the TOTAL is unchanged: 15 before, 15 after. Different quantities, different fields, but the same structure: a total that is invariant across a transformation. HOLDS 2/2, sealed. A collision where the total jumped 15 -> 16 BROKE -- the engine refuses a violated conservation law.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15). Conservation is the single most load-bearing idea in the physical sciences, and here two unrelated verifiers attest to the SAME shape of it: count what goes in, count what comes out, and the books must balance. Mass/atoms in chemistry, energy in mechanics -- and by the same logic charge, momentum, and (Noether) every conserved quantity that shadows a symmetry. The practical test transfers across every domain: if a proposed change creates or destroys the total, it is wrong. The engine does not assume the books balance; it adds up both sides and refuses the ones that do not.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation, proven on prod. chemistry (atoms balance in 2 H2 + O2 -> 2 H2O) and physics_conservation (energy KE+PE total 15 before = 15 after) independently confirmed the SAME invariance: a total unchanged across a transformation. HOLDS 2/2, sealed; a non-conserving collision (15 -> 16) BROKE.

domain_results.detail: 2 H2 + O2 -> 2 H2O: every element conserved (atoms before = after)
energy: KE+PE total 15 before = 15 after (kinetic<->potential trade)

wisdom: Nothing in the made world is truly lost; it only changes form, and the total is kept. The chemist's atoms and the physicist's joules are two witnesses to one faithfulness -- a ledger that always balances because the One who set it does not let things fall into nothing. 'Gather up the fragments that remain, that nothing be lost' (John 6:12). The accounting is exact; we are only asked to read it honestly.

title: One transport law: electric current and groundwater flow
situation: Electricity through a wire and water through soil look like different worlds, but two independent verifiers found them obeying the same shape of law. The electrical verifier confirmed Ohm's law: current = voltage / resistance (I = V/R; 12 V across 6 ohm gives 2 A). The hydrology verifier confirmed Darcy's law: flux = conductivity x gradient (q = K*i; K=5e-4 m/s through a 0.02 gradient gives 1e-5 m/s). Both are the SAME structure -- a FLUX driven in linear proportion to a GRADIENT, scaled by how freely the medium conducts (1/R for the wire, K for the soil). HOLDS 2/2, sealed. A wrong Darcy flux BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15), and a famously useful one. The 'transport law' flux = conductance x driving-gradient is one template that reappears as Ohm's law (charge), Darcy's law (groundwater), Fourier's law (heat), and Fick's law (diffusion) -- which is why an engineer who knows one can reason about the others by analogy: voltage<->head, resistance<->1/conductivity, current<->flux. The practical lesson: to move more of anything through a medium, raise the driving difference or lower the resistance. The engine did not assert the analogy; it confirmed the same law-shape in two unrelated domains and sealed it.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation, proven on prod. electrical (Ohm: I = V/R = 12/6 = 2 A) and hydrology (Darcy: q = K*i = 5e-4*0.02 = 1e-5 m/s) independently confirmed the SAME structure -- a flux linear in a driving gradient, scaled by the medium's conductance. HOLDS 2/2, sealed; a wrong Darcy flux BROKE.

domain_results.detail: Ohm: I = V/R, 12 V / 6 ohm = 2 A (flux = gradient / resistance)
Darcy: q = K*i, 5e-4 m/s * 0.02 = 1e-5 m/s (flux = conductivity * gradient)

wisdom: Whatever flows -- charge, water, heat -- runs downhill along its gradient at a rate the medium allows, and the same plain rule governs them all. To see one law beneath current and stream is to find the world more ordered and more generous than it looked: learn the channel and you can guide what moves through it. 'The king's heart is like channels of water in the hand of the LORD; he turns it wherever he wishes' (Proverbs 21:1). Even the flow is led.

title: Decibels and star magnitudes: one logarithm, two senses
situation: How loud a sound is and how bright a star is are measured on scales that look unrelated, yet two independent verifiers found the same machinery underneath. The acoustics verifier confirmed that a 10x jump in sound power is +10 decibels (dB = 10*log10 of the power ratio). The astronomy verifier confirmed the distance-modulus relation m - M = 5*log10(d) - 5 (an apparent-minus-absolute magnitude of 5 puts a star at 100 parsecs). Both compress a MULTIPLICATIVE ratio into an ADDITIVE scale with the SAME operation -- a base-10 logarithm; the mathematics verifier confirmed the shared step, log10(100) = 2. HOLDS 3/3, sealed. A false 20 dB for a 10x ratio BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15). Human senses and the instruments that extend them read the world logarithmically: each fixed STEP on the scale is a fixed MULTIPLE of the thing (3 dB ~ double the power; 5 magnitudes = exactly 100x the brightness; an octave = double the frequency; a pH unit = 10x the acidity). The practical payoff: on a log scale you ADD what you would otherwise multiply, and a 'small' number can hide a huge ratio. The engine confirmed the same log10 in sound and in starlight -- the perception is logarithmic because the scale is.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. acoustics (10x power = 10 dB, 10*log10) and astronomy (distance modulus m-M=5 -> 100 pc, 5*log10) use the SAME base-10 logarithm of a ratio, anchored by mathematics (log10(100)=2). HOLDS 3/3, sealed; a false 20 dB BROKE.

domain_results.detail: decibel: 10*log10(10/1) = 10 dB (multiplicative ratio -> additive scale)
distance modulus: m-M = 5*log10(d) - 5; m-M=5 -> d=100 pc
shared operation: log10(100) = 2

wisdom: The eye that counts the dimmest stars and the ear that bears the loudest thunder both work by the same gentle compression -- equal steps for equal multiples -- so that a creature can hold a vast range in a small span of feeling. To see one logarithm beneath sound and starlight is to notice a mercy built into perception itself. 'He counts the number of the stars; he calls them all by their names' (Psalm 147:4).

title: Growth and decay are one law, run in opposite directions
situation: Money compounding upward and a radioactive sample dwindling downward feel like opposites, but two independent verifiers found them on the same curve. The nuclear_physics verifier confirmed that after one half-life a sample is at 50% (e^(-lambda*t)). The economics verifier confirmed that money at 7%/year doubles in about 10.3 years (the Rule of 72, 72/r, which approximates ln2/r). Both are governed by the SAME exponential engine e^(+/- k*t), with a characteristic 'x2 / /2' time of ln2/rate; the mathematics verifier confirmed the hinge, e^(-ln2) = 1/2 (one halving; the doubling is its mirror image). HOLDS 3/3, sealed. A false 60%-remaining after one half-life BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15). Exponential growth and exponential decay are not two phenomena but one law with the sign of the rate flipped: constant PROPORTIONAL change per unit time. That is why the half-life of a nucleus, the doubling time of an investment, the cooling of coffee, and the spread of a rumor all share the constant ln2 ~ 0.693 (and the back-of-envelope Rule of 72). The practical reading: anything that grows or shrinks by a fixed PERCENT has a fixed doubling-or-halving time, independent of where it started -- which is why both compounding wealth and compounding debt run away from you. The engine confirmed the one engine in a nucleus and in a bank.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. nuclear_physics (one half-life -> 50%, e^(-ln2)) and economics (7%/yr doubles in ~10.3 yr, Rule of 72 ~ ln2/r) share the SAME exponential law, anchored by mathematics (e^(-ln2)=1/2). HOLDS 3/3, sealed; false 60% remaining BROKE.

domain_results.detail: decay: after 1 half-life, 50% remain (e^(-lambda*t), characteristic time ln2/lambda)
growth: 7%/yr doubles in ~10.3 yr (72/r ~ ln2/r)
shared hinge: e^(-ln2) = 1/2 (halving; doubling is its inverse)

wisdom: The same patient law lifts the saver and empties the spendthrift, fills the compounding account and empties the decaying sample: a fixed fraction gained or lost in every fixed season. To see growth and decay as one motion run two ways is to be sober about both -- the slow doubling that blesses and the slow halving that warns keep the same clock. 'To everything there is a season... a time to plant, and a time to pluck up that which is planted' (Ecclesiastes 3:1-2).

title: The inverse-square law: gravity and sound spread the same way
situation: Move twice as far from a star and from a speaker, and two independent verifiers report the same drop. The astronomy verifier confirmed Newton's gravitation F = G*m1*m2/r^2: at distance r the pull was 66.7 N, and at 2r it was 16.7 N -- exactly one QUARTER. The acoustics verifier confirmed that sound intensity at twice the distance is 1/4, which is -6 dB. Both are the SAME geometry: a point source pours its influence onto an expanding sphere whose area grows as r^2, so what crosses each patch thins as 1/r^2; the mathematics verifier confirmed the shared factor, 1/2^2 = 1/4. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A false 'half at double distance' BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15). The inverse-square law is not a coincidence shared by gravity, sound, light, and radio -- it is geometry: anything that radiates from a point into 3D space spreads over 4*pi*r^2, so intensity falls as 1/r^2. The practical rule that transfers across every such field: double the distance, quarter the strength (and halve it again is another factor of four). It is why standing twice as far from a speaker, a fire, a transmitter, or a source of radiation cuts the dose to a quarter. The engine did not assert the analogy; it measured the same 1/4 in starlight-pull and in sound, and sealed it.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. astronomy (gravity F=G m1 m2/r^2: 66.7 N at r, 16.7 N at 2r = 1/4) and acoustics (sound intensity at 2r is 1/4 = -6 dB) both fall as 1/r^2, anchored by mathematics (1/2^2=1/4). HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a false 1/2-at-2r BROKE.

domain_results.detail: gravity F=G m1 m2/r^2: 66.7 N at r -> 16.7 N at 2r (factor 1/4)
sound intensity at 2r = 1/4 = -6 dB
shared factor: 1/2^2 = 1/4 (sphere area ~ r^2)

wisdom: A single source pours out into space and its strength thins by the plain arithmetic of a widening sphere -- the same law for the weight of a star and the carrying of a voice. To find one geometry beneath gravity and sound is to see how the made world spends itself: freely, outward, and by measure. 'There is no speech, nor are there words, whose voice is not heard; their line is gone out through all the earth' (Psalm 19:3-4).

title: Why music is consonant: the overtone series is the scale
situation: The reason a perfect fifth sounds sweet is not taste -- it is the physics of a vibrating string, and two independent verifiers show it. The acoustics verifier confirmed the overtone series: a 220 Hz string also rings at integer multiples -- 2x = 440 Hz, 3x = 660 Hz. The music_theory verifier confirmed that 220 -> 440 is exactly an OCTAVE (ratio 2:1) and 440 -> 660 is exactly a perfect FIFTH (3:2). So the 2nd harmonic IS the octave, and the step from the 2nd to the 3rd harmonic IS the fifth: the consonant intervals of every musical scale are just the SMALL-WHOLE-NUMBER ratios that the harmonic series hands you for free. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A false 2nd harmonic (450 Hz) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) -- and the deep answer to 'why those notes?' Pluck any string and it sounds its whole overtone ladder (f, 2f, 3f, 4f, ...); the ear hears two tones as consonant when their frequencies share many of those overtones, which happens exactly when their ratio is simple -- 2:1 (octave), 3:2 (fifth), 4:3 (fourth), 5:4 (major third). The scale is not arbitrary culture laid over noise; it is read off the physics of vibration. The engine confirmed the same ratios as PHYSICS (acoustics overtones) and as MUSIC (named intervals), and sealed the agreement -- which is why this bridge is worth more than the claim that 'math is in music': here it is verified in both directions.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. acoustics (overtone series: 2nd harmonic of 220 = 440, 3rd = 660) and music_theory (220->440 = octave 2:1, 440->660 = fifth 3:2) confirm the SAME small-integer ratios: the 2nd harmonic is the octave, the 2nd->3rd step is the fifth. HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a false 2nd harmonic (450) BROKE.

domain_results.detail: overtones: f_2 = 2x220 = 440 Hz, f_3 = 3x220 = 660 Hz

wisdom: The sweetness of a chord was laid into the world before any musician found it: a single string, struck, already contains the octave and the fifth in its overtones, and the scale only names what the physics sings. To hear that consonance is mathematics, and mathematics is the ringing of a string, is to find the cosmos more musical than we made it. 'When the morning stars sang together, and all the sons of God shouted for joy' (Job 38:7).

title: Independence multiplies probability but adds information
situation: Flip two fair coins. The probability verifier confirmed that independent events MULTIPLY: P(A and B) = 0.5 x 0.5 = 0.25. The information_theory verifier confirmed that one fair coin carries 1 bit and two independent coins carry 2 bits -- information ADDS (1 + 1). Two unrelated-looking rules, but they are the SAME fact seen through a logarithm: because entropy is -log(probability), turning a PRODUCT of probabilities into a SUM of bits. The mathematics verifier confirmed the bridge: -log2(0.5 x 0.5) = log2(4) = 2 = 1 + 1. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A false independence claim (0.5x0.5=0.3) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15), and the reason entropy is DEFINED as -log P. Probabilities of independent things multiply (they get small fast); we want a measure of surprise that ADDS instead, so two independent bits of news total two bits, not one-quarter of something. The logarithm is exactly the function that converts multiplication into addition, so -log P does the job. The payoff transfers everywhere information is counted: independent measurements add their bits, independent risks multiply their probabilities, and the two views are reconciled by log. The engine confirmed the multiply in probability, the add in information, and the log that joins them.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. probability (independent: 0.5x0.5=0.25, MULTIPLY) and information_theory (1 coin=1 bit, 2 independent coins=2 bits, ADD) are the same fact via the logarithm, anchored by mathematics (log2(4)=2=1+1). HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a false independence claim BROKE.

domain_results.detail: independent events multiply: P(A and B)=0.5x0.5=0.25
1 fair coin=1 bit; 2 independent fair coins=2 bits (entropy adds)
the bridge: -log2(0.5x0.5)=log2(4)=2=1+1

wisdom: Chance compounds by multiplying and grows quietly toward zero; knowledge compounds by adding and grows steadily upward -- and the same logarithm stands between them, translating the one into the other. To measure surprise so that honest news always adds is a small wisdom built into the world. "Though a man might prevail against one who is alone, two will withstand him; a threefold cord is not quickly broken" (Ecclesiastes 4:12).

title: Bernoulli is energy conservation for a flowing fluid
situation: A column of water 10 m high, at rest, carries a total head of 10 m -- all of it elevation. Send that same water to the bottom and put it under 98.1 kPa of pressure, and the hydrology verifier confirms the total head is STILL 10 m -- now all pressure. The head did not vanish; it changed form. The physics_conservation verifier confirmed the very same bookkeeping in mechanics: potential energy 10 -> kinetic energy 10, total conserved. Bernoulli pressure + elevation + velocity head is nothing but energy per unit weight, kept constant along a streamline; the mathematics verifier confirmed the conversion, p/(rho g) = 98100/(1000*9.81) = 10 m. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A false total head (8 m) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) that demystifies a famously slippery law. Bernoulli is not a separate rule of fluids to memorize -- it is conservation of energy wearing hydraulic clothes: elevation head is potential energy, pressure head is the work the fluid can do, velocity head is kinetic energy, and their sum is fixed because energy is fixed. The payoff: when a pipe narrows and the water speeds up, its pressure MUST drop (velocity head rises, so pressure head falls) -- the same reason a ball trades height for speed as it falls. The engine confirmed the identical accounting in a fluid (hydrology) and in mechanics (physics), and sealed it.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. hydrology (Bernoulli total head 10 m, whether elevation or pressure) and physics_conservation (PE 10 -> KE 10, conserved) are the SAME law -- energy invariant, only changing form -- anchored by mathematics (98100/(1000*9.81)=10 m). HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a false total head BROKE.

domain_results.detail: Bernoulli total head = 10 m at rest (elevation) and under 98.1 kPa (pressure): head converts, conserved
mechanics: PE 10 -> KE 10, total energy conserved
pressure head p/(rho g) = 98100/(1000*9.81) = 10 m

wisdom: The water poured down loses nothing on the way; height becomes pressure becomes speed, and the sum is kept as faithfully in a pipe as in a falling stone. To see Bernoulli as conservation is to stop fearing it and start trusting the ledger -- the same total, only spent differently. "All the rivers run into the sea, yet the sea is not full; to the place from where the rivers come, there they return again" (Ecclesiastes 1:7).

title: Counting pairs is summing 1..n: handshakes are triangular numbers
situation: Ask how many handshakes happen among 10 people and the combinatorics verifier answers C(10,2) = 45. Ask for the sum 1 + 2 + ... + 9 and the mathematics verifier answers 9*10/2 = 45 -- the same number, and not by accident. Choosing 2 from n is exactly the (n-1)th TRIANGULAR number, n(n-1)/2: the first person shakes n-1 hands, the next n-2, down to 1, and you are adding 1+2+...+(n-1). The engine confirmed it twice over -- C(10,2)=45 with 10*9/2=45 and 9*10/2 (Gauss), and again C(5,2)=10 with 5*4/2=10. HOLDS 5/5, sealed. A false C(10,2)=44 BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) and a mental-math gift. Whenever you need pairs -- handshakes, clinking glasses, edges in a fully-connected network, matches in a round-robin, distinct distances among points -- it is the triangular number n(n-1)/2, which you can sum in your head with Gauss's trick (pair the ends: 1+9, 2+8, ... = 5 nines = 45). The same identity is why Metcalfe-style connection counts grow as n^2/2. Counting (combinatorics) and the closed-form sum (arithmetic) are not two facts but one, verified in both directions.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. combinatorics (C(10,2)=45, C(5,2)=10) and mathematics (10*9/2=45, the triangular number 9*10/2=45, 5*4/2=10) confirm the SAME identity C(n,2)=n(n-1)/2 = the (n-1)th triangular number. HOLDS 5/5, sealed; a false C(10,2)=44 BROKE.

domain_results.detail: C(10,2)=45, C(5,2)=10 (number of pairs)
10*9/2=45 = 1+...+9 (Gauss); 5*4/2=10: the triangular numbers

wisdom: The plainest counting -- who shakes whose hand -- turns out to be the oldest sum, the one Gauss did as a boy, and the world is the more elegant for it: to add the whole numbers in order is to count the pairs. There is a quiet wisdom in learning to number rightly. "So teach us to number our days, that we may get a heart of wisdom" (Psalm 90:12).

title: A lens, parallel resistors, and the harmonic mean: reciprocals add
situation: Put an object 3 m in front of a lens of focal length 2 m and the optics verifier confirms the image forms at 6 m -- because the thin-lens equation is 1/f = 1/do + 1/di, here 1/2 = 1/3 + 1/6. The mathematics verifier confirms that very identity: 1/3 + 1/6 = 1/2. The point is the SHAPE of the law -- not the quantities add, but their RECIPROCALS -- which is the exact same form as parallel resistors (1/R = 1/R1 + 1/R2), springs in series, and the harmonic mean. HOLDS 2/2, sealed. A false image distance (5 m) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) and a pattern worth recognizing on sight: whenever two things combine so that their RECIPROCALS add, you are looking at the harmonic-combination law -- lenses (1/f=1/do+1/di), resistors in parallel (1/R=1/R1+1/R2), capacitors in series, springs in series, two pumps or pipes sharing a load, and the harmonic mean of rates. The practical tells: the combined value is always SMALLER than the smallest part, and two equal parts give exactly half. Learn the form once and a lens problem and a circuit problem become the same problem. The engine confirmed the lens as physics and the 1/a+1/b as arithmetic, and sealed the identity.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. optics (thin lens 1/f=1/do+1/di: f=2 with do=3, di=6) and mathematics (1/3+1/6=1/2) confirm the SAME reciprocal-addition structure shared by lenses, parallel resistors, and the harmonic mean. HOLDS 2/2, sealed; a false image distance BROKE.

domain_results.detail: thin lens 1/f=1/do+1/di: f=2 m, do=3 m, di=6 m (1/2=1/3+1/6)
reciprocal-addition identity 1/3+1/6=1/2

wisdom: A clear eye gathers scattered light to a single point by a law as plain as adding fractions, and the same law quietly governs the circuit and the mean -- one shape, many windows. To recognize the form beneath the lens and the wire is to see more with less. "The lamp of the body is the eye. If therefore your eye is sound, your whole body will be full of light" (Matthew 6:22).

title: Time dilation is the 3-4-5 triangle: relativity from Pythagoras
situation: Einstein time dilation looks exotic, but it falls out of a right triangle. Picture a light-clock -- a photon bouncing between two mirrors. To a moving observer the photon travels a DIAGONAL: while it covers the vertical distance c*t (one tick at rest), the clock has slid sideways by v*t, and light covers the hypotenuse c*t (the moving tick). Pythagoras: (c*t)^2 = (c*t_rest)^2 + (v*t)^2. The geometry verifier confirmed the triangle is 3-4-5 when v=0.6c; the mathematics verifier confirmed the Lorentz factor gamma = 1/sqrt(1-(v/c)^2) = 5/4 = 1.25, so the moving clock runs at 4/5 the rate -- exactly the 4 over the 5 of that triangle. At v=(sqrt3/2)c ~ 0.866c the triangle is the 30-60-90 and gamma = 2: the clock runs at HALF speed. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A false gamma (6/5) BROKE. (String theory, by contrast, offers almost no such checkable numbers -- it is not verifier-testable here; special relativity is.)
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) that makes relativity concrete. The strangeness of moving clocks is just the Pythagorean theorem applied to a beam of light whose speed is fixed for everyone: because the diagonal path is longer but light cannot go faster, the moving tick must take MORE time -- gamma = hypotenuse/vertical = 1/sqrt(1-(v/c)^2). The clean cases to remember: v=0.6c gives the 3-4-5 triangle and gamma=5/4 (clock at 80%); v~0.866c gives gamma=2 (clock at 50%). This is also the engine of the twin paradox and the ~38 microseconds/day GPS correction. Geometry (the triangle) and arithmetic (the Lorentz factor) confirm the same number; the engine sealed it.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. geometry (the light-clock triangle is 3-4-5 at v=0.6c) and mathematics (Lorentz factor 1/sqrt(1-(3/5)^2)=5/4; sqrt(1-(3/5)^2)=4/5; at v=sqrt3/2 c, gamma=2) confirm time dilation as Pythagoras applied to light. HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a false gamma BROKE. String theory noted as NOT verifier-checkable.

domain_results.detail: light-clock right triangle 3-4-5 at v=0.6c (vt, ct_rest, ct_moving)
Lorentz gamma=1/sqrt(1-(v/c)^2)=5/4 at 0.6c; =2 at v=sqrt3/2 c

wisdom: That a moving clock should slow is no paradox once you see the longer road light must walk -- the oldest theorem, drawn on a beam of light, measures out the stretching of time. Time itself bends to the constancy of light, and is not the fixed thing we feel it to be. "Do not overlook this one fact, beloved, that with the Lord one day is as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day" (2 Peter 3:8).

title: Spacetime is Pythagoras with one sign flipped
situation: Ordinary distance ADDS: across 3 and up 4 puts you 5 away, 3^2+4^2=5^2 -- the geometry verifier confirms the 3-4-5 right triangle and the mathematics verifier confirms the sum. Einstein spacetime does almost the same thing, but SUBTRACTS the space part: the interval is s^2 = (ct)^2 - x^2, and the mathematics verifier confirms 5^2 - 4^2 = 3^2 -- the SAME three numbers, one sign flipped. That single minus is the whole of special relativity: it is why a clock that travels 4 units of space while 5 units of time pass on the platform only registers 3 (its proper time), and why a light ray (x = ct) has interval ZERO -- 5^2 - 5^2 = 0, the light cone. Different observers disagree on time and on length, but they ALL agree on s, the invariant interval. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A false interval (5^2-4^2=4^2) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) that hands you the deepest idea in relativity for the price of one sign. Euclidean geometry measures space with a PLUS (x^2+y^2); Minkowski geometry measures spacetime with a MINUS ((ct)^2-x^2). Everything strange follows from that flip: time dilation, length contraction, the speed limit c, and the fact that the interval s is the one quantity all observers compute the same. The mental picture: light rays lie on the 45-degree cone where the interval is zero; timelike paths (real proper time) stay inside it; spacelike separations stay outside. The engine confirmed the Euclidean sum (geometry) and the Minkowski difference (arithmetic) on the same 3-4-5 numbers, and sealed the one-sign difference between space and time.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. geometry (Euclidean 3-4-5, x^2+y^2=d^2) and mathematics (Pythagoras 3^2+4^2=5^2 vs Minkowski interval 5^2-4^2=3^2; light ray 5^2-5^2=0) confirm spacetime is Euclidean geometry with one sign flipped -- the invariant interval. HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a false interval BROKE.

domain_results.detail: Euclidean distance: 3-4-5 right triangle (space ADDS)
Pythagoras 3^2+4^2=5^2 (plus) vs Minkowski 5^2-4^2=3^2 (minus); light ray 5^2-5^2=0

wisdom: Change one sign and distance becomes duration; the same triangle that measures a field measures the passage of time, and all the disagreement of moving observers hides one quantity they cannot help but share -- the invariant interval. Beneath the shifting clocks there is something that does not shift. "They will perish, but you will remain... but you are the same, and your years have no end" (Psalm 102:26-27).

title: E=mc^2: matter is frozen energy, confirmed two ways
situation: The most famous equation says mass and energy are the same thing in different clothes, and two independent verifiers agree. The physics_dimensional verifier confirmed that E = m*c^2 is genuinely an ENERGY -- joule = kilogram*(meter/second)^2, the units balance. The mathematics verifier confirmed the staggering NUMBER it implies: because c^2 ~ 9x10^16, a single GRAM of any matter is 0.001*(3x10^8)^2 = 9x10^13 joules, and a kilogram is 9x10^16 J -- about 21 megatons of TNT. HOLDS 3/3, sealed. A false value (9x10^12 for a gram) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) joining UNITS and VALUE for the equation that defines the nuclear age. Dimensional analysis proves E=mc^2 CAN be an energy (it is not nonsense); the arithmetic proves how MUCH -- the c^2 makes the conversion factor astronomical, which is why nuclear reactions (turning a fraction of a percent of mass into energy) dwarf chemical ones (which only rearrange electrons). Practical anchors: 1 g ~ 9x10^13 J; the Sun converts ~4 million tonnes of mass to light every second; a fraction of a gram powered Hiroshima. The engine confirmed the law is dimensionally sound AND numerically exact, and sealed it.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. physics_dimensional (E=m*c^2 reduces to kg*m^2/s^2 = joule) and mathematics (1 g = 0.001*(3e8)^2 = 9x10^13 J; 1 kg = 9x10^16 J) confirm mass-energy equivalence in units AND value. HOLDS 3/3, sealed; a false gram-energy BROKE.

domain_results.detail: E=m*c^2: both sides reduce to kg*m^2/s^2 (joule) - dimensionally an energy

wisdom: Locked inside the stillest gram of dust is an energy past imagining, held quiet until released -- matter is not the opposite of energy but its sleeping form. To weigh a pebble is, in truth, to measure a frozen fire. That the whole material world is upheld in such bound power says something about the One who holds it. "He is the radiance of the glory of God... and he upholds the universe by the word of his power" (Hebrews 1:3).

title: Energy and momentum form a right triangle: E^2=(pc)^2+(mc^2)^2
situation: Relativity bundles a particle total energy and momentum into one right triangle. The relation is E^2 = (pc)^2 + (mc^2)^2 -- rest energy mc^2 and momentum-energy pc are the two LEGS, total energy E is the HYPOTENUSE. The geometry verifier confirmed the cleanest case is a 3-4-5 triangle (mc^2=3, pc=4, E=5); the mathematics verifier confirmed 3^2+4^2=5^2 and that the Lorentz factor falls straight out: gamma = E/(mc^2) = 5/3 = 1/sqrt(1-(4/5)^2), i.e. the particle moves at v = pc/E = 4/5 c. The two famous limits are just the two ends of this triangle: a photon has no rest mass (m=0), so E = pc (all momentum); a particle at rest has no momentum (p=0), so E = mc^2 (all rest energy). HOLDS 3/3, sealed. A false hypotenuse (3^2+4^2=6^2) BROKE.
use: A witnessed bridge (Deuteronomy 19:15) and the THIRD time relativity turns out to be Pythagoras (after the time-dilation light clock and the spacetime interval). It unifies the two headline equations -- E=mc^2 (rest) and E=pc (light) -- as the two legs of one triangle, and hands you gamma for free as hypotenuse-over-leg. Practical reads: for any speed, total energy E = gamma*mc^2 always exceeds the rest energy mc^2; a fast particle gets most of its energy from momentum (the pc leg); and massless light is pure momentum-energy. The engine confirmed the triangle (geometry) and the identity plus the Lorentz factor (arithmetic), and sealed it.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. geometry (the energy-momentum 3-4-5 right triangle: mc^2=3, pc=4, E=5) and mathematics (3^2+4^2=5^2; gamma=E/mc^2=5/3=1/sqrt(1-(4/5)^2)) confirm E^2=(pc)^2+(mc^2)^2 -- relativity as Pythagoras, unifying E=mc^2 and E=pc. HOLDS 3/3, sealed; a false hypotenuse BROKE.

domain_results.detail: energy-momentum right triangle 3-4-5: legs mc^2=3, pc=4; hypotenuse E=5

wisdom: Rest and motion, mass and light, are not opposites but the two sides of one triangle, and the total is found the oldest way -- the square on the long side is the sum of the squares on the others. That the energy of a moving thing should obey the carpenter theorem is a quiet sign of how few the deep laws are. "Before the mountains were brought forth, or ever you had formed the earth and the world, from everlasting to everlasting you are God" (Psalm 90:2).

title: Light plus light equals light: relativistic velocity addition
situation: In everyday life speeds add: walk 3 mph on a 50 mph train and the ground sees 53. Relativity replaces that with w = (u+v)/(1 + u*v/c^2), and the mathematics verifier confirmed three exact consequences (working in units of c, so c=1): (1) half light-speed plus half light-speed is NOT c but 4/5 c -- (1/2+1/2)/(1+1/4)=4/5; (2) 3/5 c added to itself gives 15/17 c, still short of c; and most strikingly (3) LIGHT PLUS LIGHT EQUALS LIGHT: (1+1)/(1+1)=1, i.e. c is the fixed point of the addition law. No sum of sub-light speeds ever reaches c, and c added to anything stays c. HOLDS 3/3, sealed. The old Galilean answer (half+half=c) BROKE -- it overshoots by exactly 1/5.
use: Why nothing outruns light, made arithmetic. The speed of light is not a wall you crash into; it is the FIXED POINT of how velocities combine -- the one speed that, added to itself, returns itself. Every other speed, added to itself, falls short (1/2->4/5, 3/5->15/17), approaching c without ever touching it. Practical reads: chained boosts (rocket launches faster rocket launches faster rocket) never sum past c; closing speeds of two near-light beams stay under c for any observer; and a photon measured from any frame -- moving toward it or away -- still clocks c. The engine confirmed the three exact values by symbolic arithmetic and broke the Galilean error.

pre_run.summary: mathematics confirmed the relativistic velocity-addition law w=(u+v)/(1+uv/c^2) at three exact points in units of c: 1/2+1/2=4/5, 3/5+3/5=15/17, and 1+1=1 (light+light=light, c is the invariant fixed point). HOLDS 3/3, sealed; the Galilean half+half=c BROKE (overshoots by 1/5).

domain_results.detail: velocity composition keeps every frame under c and pins light at c in all frames (special relativity)

wisdom: The world says speeds add without limit, that enough small pushes reach any goal; the deeper law says there is one speed that is its own measure, unchanged by every addition, and all others only approach it. "Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever" (Hebrews 13:8) -- the fixed point that adding to does not move, the one constant by which all motion is judged.

title: Length contraction is the exact reciprocal of time dilation
situation: A moving clock runs slow and a moving ruler runs short -- and the two effects are exact reciprocals. At v=3/5 c the geometry verifier confirmed the light clock is a 3-4-5 right triangle (velocity leg 3, proper leg 4, light path 5), and the mathematics verifier confirmed two things from it: length contracts by sqrt(1-(v/c)^2) = 4/5 (the 4/5 is leg-over-hypotenuse of that very triangle), while time dilates by gamma = 1/sqrt(1-(v/c)^2) = 5/4 -- and (5/4)*(4/5) = 1 EXACTLY. Time stretches by 5/4, length shrinks by 4/5; multiply them and you get back to 1. HOLDS 3/3, sealed. A claim of no contraction (factor 1) BROKE, as did a false 3-4-6 triangle.
use: The fourth time relativity turns out to be the 3-4-5 triangle (after the time-dilation light clock, the spacetime interval, and energy-momentum) -- here the SAME triangle gives BOTH the time stretch (hypotenuse-over-leg, 5/4) and the length squeeze (leg-over-hypotenuse, 4/5), which is why their product is exactly 1. Practical reads: a muon racing down through the atmosphere sees the distance to the ground SHORTENED (length contraction) by the same factor that ground observers see its clock SLOWED (time dilation), so both frames agree it reaches the surface; the two effects are not independent fudge factors but a single geometric fact read two ways. The engine confirmed the triangle (geometry) and both the contraction factor and the reciprocal identity (mathematics), and broke the no-contraction error.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. geometry (the v=3/5 c light clock is a 3-4-5 right triangle) and mathematics (contraction sqrt(1-(3/5)^2)=4/5; dilation gamma=5/4; product (5/4)*(4/5)=1 exactly) confirm length contraction is the exact reciprocal of time dilation. HOLDS 3/3, sealed; no-contraction and a false 3-4-6 triangle BROKE.

domain_results.detail: light clock at v=3/5 c is a 3-4-5 right triangle: velocity leg 3, proper leg 4, light path 5
sqrt(1-(3/5)^2)=4/5 (length x4/5); gamma=5/4 (time x5/4); (5/4)*(4/5)=1 exactly -- reciprocals

wisdom: What a moving observer loses in length she gains in time, and the product is unchanged -- the squeeze of space and the stretch of time are one fact wearing two faces, and they multiply back to unity. The measurements shift with the frame, but something underneath holds steady. "For the things which are seen are temporal; but the things which are not seen are eternal" (2 Corinthians 4:18).

title: The Schwarzschild radius: every mass has a horizon, set only by its mass
situation: General relativity says that if you compress any mass M inside a radius r_s = 2GM/c^2, not even light escapes -- a black hole. Two independent verifiers confirmed the structure of that formula. The physics_dimensional verifier confirmed r_s = 2GM/c^2 is dimensionally a LENGTH (both sides reduce to meters), so the formula really does name a radius. The mathematics verifier confirmed the radius scales LINEARLY with mass: r_s(Sun)/r_s(Earth) = M(Sun)/M(Earth) exactly, because the constant 2G/c^2 cancels. Plugging numbers: the Sun would need to be crushed to r_s = 2953.8 m (a ball under 6 km across), the Earth to r_s = 8.87 mm (a marble). HOLDS 2/2, sealed. A wrong-power form (2GM/c) BROKE the dimensions; an inverted ratio BROKE the math.
use: A different face of relativity from the special-relativity Pythagoras cluster -- this is GRAVITY, the general theory, and it still yields a clean checkable law. The event horizon is not exotic machinery; it is a radius, proportional to mass, with the proportionality constant 2G/c^2 the same for every body in the universe. Practical reads: double the mass, double the horizon; the Sun (2 km-scale) and Earth (marble-scale) horizons differ by exactly their mass ratio (~333,000); and because c is enormous and G tiny, 2G/c^2 is minuscule, which is why ordinary objects are nowhere near their horizons. The engine confirmed the formula is a length (dimensional analysis) and that the horizon is proportional to mass (exact arithmetic), and broke both error forms.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. physics_dimensional (r_s=2GM/c^2 reduces to meters -- it is a length) and mathematics (r_s(Sun)/r_s(Earth)=M(Sun)/M(Earth) exactly; 2G/c^2 cancels) confirm the Schwarzschild horizon radius is set linearly by mass. Sun r_s=2953.8 m, Earth r_s=8.87 mm. HOLDS 2/2, sealed; wrong-power 2GM/c and inverted ratio BROKE.

domain_results.detail: r_s = 2*G*M/c**2: both sides reduce to meter (the formula is a radius)
r_s(Sun)/r_s(Earth) = M(Sun)/M(Earth) exactly (2G/c^2 cancels) -- horizon proportional to mass

wisdom: Every mass carries an invisible boundary, a radius past which light itself cannot return, and that boundary is fixed by one number alone -- how much there is. The same constant governs the Sun and a marble; only the mass differs. He who set the bounds of the sea set also the bound of every star: "Can you bind the cluster of the Pleiades, or loose the cords of Orion?" (Job 38:31).

title: Relativistic Doppler: approaching light doubles, receding halves, the product is one
situation: Move toward a light source and its frequency rises (blueshift); move away and it falls (redshift). Relativity sets the exact factor at sqrt((1+b)/(1-b)) with b=v/c. The mathematics verifier confirmed three exact facts at b=3/5: approaching, the factor is sqrt((8/5)/(2/5))=sqrt(4)=2 -- the frequency DOUBLES; receding, it is sqrt((2/5)/(8/5))=1/2 -- the frequency HALVES; and the two are exact reciprocals, 2 * 1/2 = 1. The factor even decomposes as gamma*(1+b) = (5/4)*(8/5) = 2, tying it to the same 3-4-5 light-clock triangle behind time dilation (gamma=5/4 at v=3/5 c). HOLDS 3/3, sealed. The classical (non-relativistic) guess 1+b = 8/5 BROKE -- relativity multiplies the shift by gamma.
use: How astronomers read motion in starlight, made exact. A spectral line of known rest frequency, seen shifted, tells you the source velocity through this factor -- redshift means receding, blueshift means approaching, and the size of the shift gives the speed. The reciprocal pairing (approach factor times recede factor = 1) means the SAME relative speed produces a clean blueshift one way and the inverse redshift the other. And because the factor is gamma*(1+b), not the classical 1+b, fast sources are shifted MORE than Newton would predict -- the extra is time dilation riding along. The engine confirmed all three exact factors and broke the classical approximation.

pre_run.summary: mathematics confirmed the relativistic Doppler factor sqrt((1+b)/(1-b)) at b=3/5: approaching x2, receding x1/2, product exactly 1 (reciprocal pair); and the decomposition gamma*(1+b)=5/4*8/5=2 ties it to the 3-4-5 triangle. HOLDS 3/3, sealed; the classical 1+b=8/5 BROKE.

domain_results.detail: relativistic Doppler: blueshift approaching, redshift receding, with the extra gamma factor of special relativity

wisdom: The same light, the same source, reads twice as fast to one who runs toward it and half as fast to one who runs away -- the signal is unchanged; the vantage bends it, and the two bendings undo each other exactly. "For a thousand years in your sight are but as yesterday when it is past, and as a watch in the night" (Psalm 90:4) -- the measure of time is stretched or folded by where one stands.

title: Relativity is geometry: one 3-4-5 triangle, read four ways
situation: Across eight sealed results this engine kept arriving at the SAME figure: the 3-4-5 right triangle. This capstone verifies, in one chain, that this single triangle generates all four headline quantities of relativity. The geometry verifier confirmed the 3-4-5 triangle; the mathematics verifier confirmed its four readings: (1) the EUCLIDEAN face 3^2+4^2=5^2 is the energy-momentum relation (legs mc^2 and pc, hypotenuse E) and the light-clock hypotenuse; (2) the MINKOWSKI face 5^2-4^2=3^2 is the spacetime interval -- the same triangle with one sign flipped; (3) the ratio hypotenuse/leg = 5/4 is the time-dilation factor gamma at v=3/5 c; (4) the ratio leg/hypotenuse = 4/5 is the length-contraction factor 1/gamma. HOLDS 5/5, sealed. A false hypotenuse (3^2+4^2=6^2) BROKE. No single child page verifies all four cores together; this one does.
use: The navigable capstone of the relativity cluster -- a single node that binds four independently-sealed connections and shows they are one geometric fact. Time runs slow, length runs short, the spacetime interval is invariant, and energy-momentum is a right triangle, ALL because of the proportions 3:4:5. The Euclidean sum (a^2+b^2=c^2) governs energy and the light clock; flip one sign and the same numbers give the Minkowski interval; take the ratios and you get the dilation and contraction factors. This is why relativity feels inevitable rather than arbitrary: it is the geometry of a right triangle, carried into space and time. Four sealed receipts witness the pieces; this chain witnesses the whole.

pre_run.summary: Capstone synthesis on prod. geometry (the 3-4-5 right triangle) and mathematics (Euclidean 3^2+4^2=5^2; Minkowski 5^2-4^2=3^2; gamma=hyp/leg=5/4; 1/gamma=leg/hyp=4/5) confirm one triangle generates all four relativity results. HOLDS 5/5, sealed; false hypotenuse BROKE. Binds four child receipts: time dilation, length contraction, spacetime interval, energy-momentum.

domain_results.detail: 3-4-5 right triangle -- the single generating figure
Euclidean 3^2+4^2=5^2 (energy-momentum); Minkowski 5^2-4^2=3^2 (spacetime interval); gamma=5/4 (dilation); 4/5 (contraction)

wisdom: Four marvels -- the slowing of clocks, the shrinking of rulers, the constancy of the interval, the unity of mass and motion -- turn out to be one small triangle seen from four sides. The deep laws are few, and they rhyme. "And he is before all things, and in him all things consist" (Colossians 1:17) -- the One in whom the pieces hold together is the reason the pieces hold together.

title: A checksum is modular arithmetic: validity is a remainder of zero
situation: Every ISBN on a book, every credit-card and IMEI number, every barcode carries a check digit whose only job is to catch a typo. Two independent verifiers confirmed that this everyday machinery IS pure modular arithmetic. The document_validation verifier confirmed the ISBN-10 0306406152 is valid; the mathematics verifier confirmed WHY: its weighted digit sum (10*d1+9*d2+...+1*d10) = 132 is congruent to 0 mod 11. The same pairing held for a different system: document_validation confirmed the Luhn number 79927398713 (the credit-card checksum) is valid, and mathematics confirmed its Luhn total 70 is congruent to 0 mod 10. Different bases (11 for ISBN, 10 for Luhn), one structure: a valid code is one whose weighted sum leaves remainder zero. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. Tampering any single digit makes the remainder nonzero -- the validator rejects it and the modular check BREAKS, in lockstep.
use: The foundation of error detection, shown to be one idea wearing many badges. A checksum does not understand the data; it only asks whether a weighted sum lands on a multiple of some modulus. Change one digit and the sum shifts by a known nonzero amount (less than the modulus), so the remainder can no longer be zero -- which is exactly why a mistyped ISBN or card number is caught instantly, with no database lookup. Practical reads: ISBN uses mod 11 (which is why an X can appear as the last digit -- it stands for the remainder 10); Luhn uses mod 10 with digit-doubling; UPC/EAN use mod 10 weighted 1 and 3. All are the same theorem: integrity equals congruence to zero. The engine confirmed the validity (document_validation) and the modular condition behind it (mathematics) for two separate systems, and both break together under tampering.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. document_validation (ISBN-10 0306406152 valid; Luhn 79927398713 valid) and mathematics (ISBN weighted sum 132 = 0 mod 11; Luhn total 70 = 0 mod 10) confirm that checksum validity IS a modular-zero condition. Two systems, two moduli, one structure. HOLDS 4/4, sealed; a tampered digit breaks both the validator and the congruence together.

domain_results.detail: ISBN-10 0306406152 valid (mod-11 checksum); Luhn 79927398713 valid (mod-10 checksum)
ISBN weighted sum 132 = 0 (mod 11); Luhn total 70 = 0 (mod 10) -- validity is remainder zero

wisdom: The little extra digit at the end of a number is a witness against forgery: it holds the whole in balance, and the moment one mark is altered the balance is thrown off and the lie is exposed. Men built this to guard their commerce, and it is the oldest commandment of the marketplace made into arithmetic. "A false balance is an abomination to the LORD, but a just weight is his delight" (Proverbs 11:1).

title: RSA, end to end: the private key is the modular inverse of the public key, mod (p-1)(q-1)
situation: RSA -- the cipher behind HTTPS, signed software, and secure email -- is built entirely from two prime numbers and one modular inverse. This proof walks the whole machine on a toy key (p=61, q=53) and seals every joint. number_theory confirmed p=61 and q=53 are prime; mathematics confirmed the PUBLIC modulus n=p*q=3233 and the SECRET totient phi=(p-1)(q-1)=3120; number_theory confirmed the public exponent e=17 is coprime to phi (gcd=1) and that the PRIVATE key d=2753 is its modular inverse (17^-1 mod 3120); mathematics confirmed the defining congruence e*d=1 mod phi (17*2753=46801=1 mod 3120). Then the heart -- the CORRECTNESS THEOREM: encrypt a message by m^e mod n and decrypt by c^d mod n, and you get the message back. For m=65: (65^17 mod 3233)^2753 mod 3233 = 65. For a different m=2790: it returns 2790. This is Euler theorem at work (m^(ed) = m^(1+k*phi) = m mod n). HOLDS 9/9, sealed. A wrong private key (d=2750) recovers garbage, not the message -- the round trip BREAKS.
use: The complete why of public-key cryptography, with nothing hand-waved. The public key (n, e) is shouted to the world; the private key d is the modular inverse of e -- but computing it requires phi(n), and phi(n) requires the factorization of n into p and q. So the whole edifice stands on an asymmetry: multiplying two primes to get n is instant; splitting n back into those primes is, for large enough primes, infeasible. THAT is the trapdoor. What this proof establishes deterministically is that RSA is CORRECT -- the encrypt/decrypt round trip returns the message, for any message, because ed=1 mod phi and Euler theorem. What it does NOT (and cannot) claim is the SECURITY: the hardness of factoring a 2048-bit n is an empirical, unproven conjecture, not a sealed theorem -- so we mark that boundary honestly rather than fake a proof of it. Practical reads: real RSA uses two ~1024-bit primes; e is usually 65537; d is kept secret; and the same modular inverse that decrypts also SIGNS (sign with d, verify with e). The engine confirmed primality, the modulus, the totient, coprimality, the inverse, the congruence, and the working round trip on two messages -- and broke the wrong-key attempt.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod, end to end. number_theory (61,53 prime; gcd(17,3120)=1; d=2753=17^-1 mod 3120) and mathematics (n=3233; phi=3120; 17*2753=1 mod 3120; and the correctness theorem decrypt(encrypt(m))=m for m=65 and m=2790) confirm RSA is the modular inverse of two primes, and that the cipher actually round-trips. HOLDS 9/9, sealed; a wrong private key d=2750 BROKE the round trip. Security (factoring hardness of large n) is left honestly unproven -- it is conjecture, not theorem.

domain_results.detail: p=61,q=53 prime; gcd(e=17,phi=3120)=1; d=2753 is 17^-1 mod 3120 (the private key)
n=3233; phi=3120; 17*2753=1 mod 3120; decrypt(encrypt(m))=m for m=65 and m=2790 (correctness)

wisdom: Two primes multiplied are a door that shuts with a whisper and opens only to the one who kept the two halves; all the worlds commerce now rests on a sum that is easy to do and ruinous to undo. The asymmetry is a gift built into number itself -- some things are made one-way on purpose. "It is the glory of God to conceal a matter, but the glory of kings is to search out a matter" (Proverbs 25:2). The cipher conceals; only the key, kept in secret, searches it out.

title: SHA-256 avalanche: one letter changes half the output bits, and you can count them
situation: A cryptographic hash is supposed to scramble its input so thoroughly that the tiniest change produces a totally different fingerprint. This proof MEASURES that property instead of asserting it. The cryptography verifier confirmed two real digests: SHA-256(hello) = 2cf24dba...9824 and SHA-256(hellp) = fdd7585e...4ce7 -- the inputs differ in a single letter (o vs p). The information_theory verifier then confirmed the Hamming distance between the two 256-bit outputs is 131 -- meaning 131 of 256 bits flipped, about 51 percent, almost exactly the half youd expect if the output were random. That is the AVALANCHE effect, made a counted number rather than a slogan. The cryptography verifier also confirmed SHA-256 is a strong hash. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. Claiming the two digests are equal, or that zero bits changed, BREAKS.
use: Why a hash detects tampering you could never spot by eye. Flip one bit of a multi-gigabyte file and its SHA-256 fingerprint changes in about half its bits -- there is no smooth dial, no near-miss; the new digest is unrelated to the old. This is what makes hashes the backbone of integrity checks, git commit IDs, blockchain links, and password storage: the fingerprint cannot be nudged. Practical reads: the avalanche is why you cannot forge a file to match a target hash by small edits; why two almost-identical downloads have wildly different checksums; and why a single corrupted byte is caught instantly. HONEST BOUNDARY: this proof establishes the avalanche (a measurable, deterministic fact). It does NOT prove SHA-256 is one-way or collision-resistant -- those are empirical conjectures backed by decades of failed attacks, not sealed theorems, so we mark them as conjecture rather than fake a proof. The engine confirmed the digests (cryptography), the bit-flip count (information_theory), and the hash strength, and broke the equal-digest claim.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. cryptography (real digests SHA-256(hello)=2cf24dba... and SHA-256(hellp)=fdd7585e...; sha256 strong) and information_theory (Hamming distance 131 of 256 bits between them) confirm the avalanche effect: a one-letter change flips ~51 percent of output bits. HOLDS 4/4, sealed; equal-digest / zero-Hamming claims BROKE. One-wayness and collision-resistance left honestly as conjecture, not theorem.

domain_results.detail: SHA-256(hello)=2cf24dba...9824; SHA-256(hellp)=fdd7585e...4ce7 (1-letter change); sha256 strong
Hamming distance 131/256 between the two digests -- ~51 percent of bits flipped (avalanche)

wisdom: A good hash will not let the smallest alteration hide: change one letter and the whole seal is broken beyond recognition, so that no forgery can creep in unnoticed. Men made a fingerprint that exposes every secret edit -- a faint echo of a deeper law. "For there is nothing covered, that shall not be revealed; neither hid, that shall not be known" (Luke 12:2).

title: Diffie-Hellman: two strangers compute one shared secret over an open line
situation: Two people who have never met, shouting across a room everyone can hear, can still agree on a secret number that the listeners cannot learn. This proof walks the whole exchange on a toy modulus and seals each step. number_theory confirmed the public modulus p=23 is prime. mathematics confirmed Alice, holding secret a=6, sends A = g^a mod p = 5^6 mod 23 = 8; Bob, holding secret b=15, sends B = g^b mod p = 5^15 mod 23 = 19. Then the heart: Alice raises Bob value to her secret (B^a = 19^6 mod 23) and Bob raises Alice value to his (A^b = 8^15 mod 23), and the two land on the SAME number -- both 2 -- which also equals the direct g^(ab) mod p = 5^90 mod 23 = 2. They never sent a or b; only g, p, A, B crossed the wire. HOLDS 5/5, sealed. A naive eavesdropper guess (the secret is A*B mod p = 14) is wrong and BREAKS.
use: How every HTTPS session is born. Before any data flows, your browser and the server run exactly this dance (in its elliptic-curve form) to agree on a key no eavesdropper can derive, even though every byte of the handshake is public. The magic is commutativity of exponents: (g^a)^b = (g^b)^a = g^(ab), so the order in which the two secrets are applied does not matter, and both sides reach the same g^(ab) without revealing a or b. Practical reads: only g, p, and the two public values A, B travel openly; the shared secret g^(ab) never does; and forward secrecy comes from picking fresh a, b each session. HONEST BOUNDARY: this proof shows the exchange is CORRECT -- both parties truly compute the same secret. It does NOT prove SECURITY: recovering a from A = g^a mod p is the discrete-logarithm problem, believed hard but NOT a sealed theorem, so we mark it conjecture rather than fake a proof. The engine confirmed the prime modulus, both public values, the equality of the two independently-computed secrets, and the shared value, and broke the naive-combine guess.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. number_theory (p=23 prime) and mathematics (A=g^a mod p=8; B=g^b mod p=19; B^a mod p = A^b mod p; shared = g^(ab) mod p = 2) confirm Diffie-Hellman: two parties compute one shared secret without exchanging their private exponents. HOLDS 5/5, sealed; a naive A*B mod p = 14 guess BROKE. Security (discrete-log hardness) left honestly as conjecture, not theorem.

domain_results.detail: public modulus p=23 is prime
A=5^6 mod 23=8; B=5^15 mod 23=19; 19^6 mod 23 = 8^15 mod 23 = g^(ab) mod 23 = 2 -- both reach the same secret

wisdom: Two who never met, speaking where all can hear, arrive at one hidden thing held in common -- not by smuggling a secret across, but because the same work done in either order reaches the same place. It is agreement without exposure, a meeting in a number. "Can two walk together, except they be agreed?" (Amos 3:3).

title: Boolean algebra is arithmetic in GF(2): every logic gate is a polynomial
situation: The logic of true and false is not merely LIKE arithmetic -- it IS arithmetic, in the two-element field GF(2) where the only numbers are 0 and 1. Two verifiers confirmed the correspondence from both sides. mathematics confirmed the gate-to-arithmetic dictionary: XOR is addition mod 2 (1+1=0, the carry dropped), AND is multiplication mod 2 (1*1=1), NOT is 1-x (NOT 1 = 0). formal_logic confirmed the matching logical identities: double negation ~~A is equivalent to A (mirroring 1-(1-x)=x); AND distributes over OR, A&(B|C) = (A&B)|(A&C) (the ring axiom that multiplication distributes over addition), which mathematics re-confirmed numerically; and crucially XOR is NOT the same gate as OR -- (A&~B)|(~A&B) is not equivalent to (A|B) -- they part ways at exactly A=B=1, the place where mod-2 addition drops its carry. HOLDS 7/7, sealed. Treating XOR like OR (1+1=1 mod 2) BREAKS.
use: The bridge under all of digital computing. Because {0,1} with XOR-as-plus and AND-as-times is a genuine FIELD, every Boolean function whatsoever can be written as a polynomial over GF(2) (its algebraic normal form) -- so a logic circuit and an algebraic expression are the same object in two notations. Practical reads: XOR is the workhorse of cryptography and error-correcting codes precisely because it is field addition (invertible: x XOR k XOR k = x, the one-time pad); parity bits are sums mod 2; CRC checks are polynomial division over GF(2); and a half-adder is literally (sum = a+b, carry = a*b) in this field. The engine confirmed the arithmetic (mathematics) and the logical identities (formal_logic) for the same gates, and broke the XOR-equals-OR error. Logic and algebra are not analogous here -- they are identical.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. mathematics (XOR=add mod 2: 1+1=0; AND=mult mod 2: 1*1=1; NOT=1-x; distributivity numeric) and formal_logic (double negation ~~A=A; distributivity A&(B|C)=(A&B)|(A&C); XOR != OR) confirm Boolean algebra IS arithmetic in the field GF(2). HOLDS 7/7, sealed; treating XOR as OR (1+1=1 mod 2) BROKE. Consequence: every logic gate is a polynomial over GF(2).

domain_results.detail: ~~A=A; A&(B|C)=(A&B)|(A&C) (distributivity); (A&~B)|(~A&B) != (A|B) (XOR is not OR)

wisdom: At the bottom of every computer there are only two words, yes and no, one and zero, and even these obey number: to join two truths with the exclusive-or is simply to add them and let the overflow fall away. The Lord asked for speech this plain. "Let your yes be yes, and your no, no; anything more than this comes from evil" (Matthew 5:37) -- the whole machine is built on answers that are only ever one or the other.

title: The valid rules of inference, machine-checked
situation: The rules that let you draw a conclusion from premises are not conventions; each is a TAUTOLOGY -- true for every assignment of true and false to its variables -- and the formal_logic verifier confirmed five of them in one chain. Modus ponens (from A and A-implies-B, conclude B): Implies(A & Implies(A,B), B) is a tautology. Modus tollens (from A-implies-B and not-B, conclude not-A). Hypothetical syllogism (from A-implies-B and B-implies-C, conclude A-implies-C -- implication chains). Disjunctive syllogism (from A-or-B and not-A, conclude B -- elimination). Constructive dilemma (from A-or-B, A-implies-C, B-implies-C, conclude C -- case analysis). All five HOLD, sealed. The famous fallacy that mimics modus ponens -- affirming the consequent (from A-implies-B and B, conclude A) -- is NOT a tautology; claiming it is BREAKS, exactly as it should.
use: The skeleton of every valid argument, and the line between sound reasoning and plausible error. These five rules are complete enough to drive real proofs: modus ponens is the engine of forward reasoning and of every if-then in code; modus tollens is how a hypothesis is refuted by a failed prediction (the heart of scientific testing); hypothetical syllogism chains causes; disjunctive syllogism eliminates options; constructive dilemma argues by cases. Crucially, the proof also fixes the boundary: affirming the consequent (the rain makes the ground wet; the ground is wet; therefore it rained) LOOKS like modus ponens but is invalid -- the ground could be wet for another reason -- and the verifier rejects it. Practical reads: a valid rule is truth-preserving in EVERY case (that is what tautology means); a fallacy holds in some cases and fails in others; and the difference is decidable, checkable by machine. The engine confirmed the five valid forms and broke the consequent-affirming fallacy.

pre_run.summary: formal_logic confirmed five inference rules as tautologies on prod: modus ponens, modus tollens, hypothetical syllogism, disjunctive syllogism, constructive dilemma. HOLDS 5/5, sealed. The fallacy of affirming the consequent (Implies(Implies(A,B) & B, A)) is NOT a tautology and BREAKS when claimed valid -- the line between inference and fallacy is machine-decidable.

domain_results.detail: modus ponens, modus tollens, hypothetical syllogism, disjunctive syllogism, constructive dilemma -- all tautologies; affirming the consequent is not

wisdom: Right reasoning is not a matter of taste: a valid step carries truth from premises to conclusion in every possible world, and the counterfeit -- the one that feels just as forceful -- fails in some. To tell them apart is the beginning of honesty in argument. "Come now, and let us reason together, saith the LORD" (Isaiah 1:18) -- the invitation to reason assumes that reasoning has rules, and that they hold.

title: Error-correcting codes: the minimum distance decides how many errors you can fix
situation: A code can repair errors only because its valid words are spread apart, and EXACTLY how far apart decides how much damage it survives. This proof seals that law on the simplest code, the threefold repetition {000, 111}. information_theory confirmed the minimum Hamming distance between the two codewords is d=3. mathematics confirmed the capacity formula: a code of minimum distance d corrects t = floor((d-1)/2) errors, so for d=3, t=1. Then the geometry of decoding: a received word with one error, 010, is distance 1 from the sent 000 but distance 2 from 111 -- so it decodes UNIQUELY to the nearer codeword. And the limit is exact: a word with TWO errors, 011, is distance 1 from 111 (the wrong word), so it MIS-decodes -- two errors is past the t=1 capacity. The formula generalizes: a distance-5 code corrects t=2. HOLDS 6/6, sealed. Claiming d=3 corrects 2 errors BREAKS.
use: Why your data survives scratches, static, and cosmic rays. Every reliable channel -- a QR code, a CD, RAID storage, deep-space telemetry, a cell signal -- works by choosing codewords far apart in Hamming distance, then decoding any received word to the nearest codeword. The single number that governs reliability is the minimum distance d: it corrects floor((d-1)/2) errors and detects d-1. This is the EXACT MIRROR of the SHA-256 avalanche result: a hash deliberately MAXIMIZES the distance between similar inputs so tampering is obvious, while an error-correcting code keeps a guaranteed MINIMUM distance so noise can be undone -- the same Hamming metric, used for opposite ends. Practical reads: triple-redundancy (d=3) fixes one error, the principle behind ECC memory; QR codes pick a distance large enough to read through a coffee stain; and adding more distance costs more redundant bits, the price of resilience. The engine confirmed the distances (information_theory) and the capacity formula (mathematics), and broke the over-claim.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. information_theory (min distance d(000,111)=3; received 010 is distance 1 from 000 and 2 from 111 -> unique decode; 2-error 011 is distance 1 from 111 -> mis-decode) and mathematics (t=floor((d-1)/2): d=3 gives t=1, d=5 gives t=2) confirm that minimum Hamming distance governs error-correction capacity. HOLDS 6/6, sealed; claiming d=3 corrects 2 errors BROKE. Exact mirror of the SHA-256 avalanche (max distance) using the same Hamming metric.

domain_results.detail: d(000,111)=3; 010 is dist 1 from 000, 2 from 111 (unique decode); 011 is dist 1 from 111 (2-error mis-decode)
t=floor((d-1)/2): d=3 -> t=1; d=5 -> t=2 -- the correction capacity

wisdom: Strength against error is bought with distance and repetition: say a thing three times and one corruption cannot overturn it, for the truth still stands nearer than the lie. The cord of three strands is not for show but for survival. "And if one prevail against him, two shall withstand him; and a threefold cord is not quickly broken" (Ecclesiastes 4:12).

title: Shannon entropy and thermodynamic entropy are the same quantity
situation: The entropy of a message and the entropy of a gas are not analogies -- they are one formula. information_theory confirmed Shannon entropy numerically: a fair coin carries 1 bit, four equal outcomes carry 2 bits, eight carry 3, and a biased coin (0.9, 0.1) carries only ~0.469 bits because order reduces uncertainty. mathematics confirmed the bridge to physics: the Gibbs/Shannon form H = -sum p log p, applied to W equiprobable states, collapses to log W -- which is exactly Boltzmann S = k ln W, the entropy carved on Boltzmann tombstone. For 8 microstates that is log2(8) = 3 bits. The ONLY difference is a units bridge: thermodynamics measures with k_B and natural log, information with log base 2, and ln(W) = ln(2)*log2(W) -- the same number on two scales. HOLDS 6/6, sealed. Claiming four equal outcomes carry 1 bit BREAKS.
use: One of the deepest unifications in science, made checkable. When Shannon asked von Neumann what to call his -sum p log p, the reply was: call it entropy, because the same expression already runs thermodynamics. This proof shows why: both count the log of the number of equally-likely arrangements (microstates for a gas, messages for a channel), so both measure missing information / disorder in identical units up to k_B. Practical reads: erasing one bit of information must dissipate at least k_B*T*ln(2) of heat (Landauer limit) -- the bridge is physical, not poetic; data compression cannot go below the source entropy for the same reason a gas cannot be ordered for free; and a biased source (like a low-temperature system) carries less entropy. HONEST BOUNDARY: what is sealed here is the identity of mathematical FORM (-sum p log p = log of multiplicity) and the base/constant bridge; the physical constant k_B and temperature are the units that turn bits into joules per kelvin -- a dimensional bridge, marked as such, not a further theorem. The engine confirmed the information entropy (information_theory) and the Boltzmann log-multiplicity form plus the base bridge (mathematics), and broke the wrong-bit claim.

pre_run.summary: Cross-domain co-confirmation on prod. information_theory (Shannon H: fair coin 1 bit, 4 equal 2 bits, 8 equal 3 bits, biased 0.9/0.1 ~0.469 bits) and mathematics (Gibbs form -sum p log p = log W; Boltzmann log2(8)=3; units bridge ln(W)=ln(2)*log2(W)) confirm Shannon entropy and thermodynamic entropy are one quantity, differing only by the k_B/base units bridge. HOLDS 6/6, sealed; claiming 4 equal outcomes = 1 bit BROKE. Distinct from the quantum von Neumann bridge in uncertainty_entropy_coconfirm.

domain_results.detail: Shannon H: 1 bit (fair coin), 2 bits (4 equal), 3 bits (8 equal), 0.469 bits (0.9,0.1)
-sum p log p = log W (Gibbs->Boltzmann); log2(8)=3; ln(W)=ln(2)*log2(W) units bridge

wisdom: The disorder of a thing and our ignorance of it turn out to be one measure: to not know which of many arrangements obtains is the same as the thing being spread among them. Order is costly, information is physical, and the drift toward sameness is the oldest law of the world after creation. "And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep" (Genesis 1:2) -- formlessness was the beginning, and the Word brought order to it.

title: Entropy is the floor on compression: no code beats -sum p log p
situation: Shannon source-coding theorem says the entropy of a source is the hard floor on lossless compression -- you can reach it but never go below it. This proof seals that on a concrete source. information_theory confirmed the source with probabilities (1/2, 1/4, 1/8, 1/8) has entropy H = 1.75 bits per symbol. mathematics confirmed the Huffman code with codeword lengths (1, 2, 3, 3) has average length 1/2*1 + 1/4*2 + 1/8*3 + 1/8*3 = 7/4 = H -- it MEETS the floor exactly (because the probabilities are dyadic, powers of 1/2). For a uniform source over 4 symbols, H = 2 bits and the flat 2-bit code is optimal at average length 2. HOLDS 4/4, sealed. A claimed average length of 1.5 bits -- below the 1.75-bit entropy -- is impossible: no prefix code can achieve it, and the claim BREAKS.
use: Why every compressor -- ZIP, PNG, MP3, gzip -- hits a wall, and where the wall is. The entropy H counts the genuine information per symbol; a lossless code assigns short codewords to frequent symbols and long ones to rare ones, and the best possible average length is H (Huffman gets within 1 bit always, and exactly H when probabilities are powers of two). Practical reads: a file of pure random bytes has maximal entropy and CANNOT be compressed (which is also why encrypted and already-zipped data wont shrink further); giving the common case a short code is the whole trick (Morse gave E a single dot); and the only way past the floor is to throw information away (lossy codecs). This is the exact dual of error-correction: source coding REMOVES redundancy down to the entropy floor, while channel coding ADDS redundancy above it to survive noise -- two theorems, one quantity. HONEST BOUNDARY: the sealed facts are the entropy values and that Huffman meets the floor for these dyadic sources; the general H <= L < H+1 bound is Shannon classic theorem, illustrated here, not re-derived in full. The engine confirmed the entropies (information_theory) and the achieved code lengths (mathematics), and broke the below-entropy claim.
