title: Fast Unseen: the Reward Kept Where No Eye Can Spend It
word_parts: nesteuo[G3522]=to fast, abstain from food religiously . hypokrites[G5273]=actor under an assumed character, stage-player, dissembler . skythropos[G4659]=of a sad, gloomy, mournful countenance (deliberately put on) . aphanizo[G853]=to render unapparent, disfigure, becloud, make-vanish (they DISFIGURE their faces so as to APPEAR) . phaino[G5316]=to shine, to be seen, to appear (the wordplay: disfigure-to-appear) . prosopon[G4383]=the face, countenance, the front-toward-view . anthropos[G444]=man, human being (the audience they play to) . apecho[G568]=to have in full, receive the receipt-paid (the commercial term: their wages are paid out, account closed) . misthos[G3408]=pay, wages, reward (for service, good or bad) . aleipho[G218]=to anoint, oil (with perfume) . nipto[G3538]=to wash (face, hands, feet) . kruphaios[no Strong]=hidden, secret, in-the-hidden-place . pater[G3962]=Father . blepo[G991]=to see, look at, behold (the Father who sees-into the hidden) . apodidomi[G591]=to give back, render, repay, restore (pay back in full what is due)
teaching: When you fast, do not put on a gloomy, disfigured face the way the stage-players do -- they wreck their own appearance precisely so they will APPEAR to men to be fasting, and the moment men see it, their account is settled: apecho, paid in full, receipt stamped, nothing more is owed them. Instead, oil your head and wash your face so that your fasting is invisible to men and visible only to the Father who is in the hidden place. He who sees into the hidden will himself pay it back. The teaching means exactly what it says: the discipline is real and costly, but its audience is ONE, and the choosing of audience determines who pays the wage.
wisdom: This is the third panel of the Sermon's secret-discipline triptych (giving 6:1-4, praying 6:5-6, fasting 6:16-18), and on the engine's map it is the GOD-WAIT gate made into a bodily practice. AUTHORITY (RED): the words are the Lord's own commission of secrecy -- canon_red_gate_jn14_6 is the road, and here the Road tells you which way to face while you walk it. WAIT (the fourth gate): apecho/apodidomi is the whole axis -- the actor takes apecho (wages now, in full, account closed) while the hidden faster takes apodidomi (the Father pays back later). The reward is deliberately deferred, kept where moth and rust and applause cannot reach it: this is PERMANENCE, the reward stored where it cannot be lost or spent (bond to teaching_parable_treasure_and_pearl, and to the Beatitude floor's "great is your reward in heaven"). The VERIFIER / FRUIT TEST runs underneath: skythropos and aphanizo are a manufactured fruit, a costume of piety; the Father's blepo reads the actual fruit in the hidden place where no costume holds -- by their fruits, not their faces, judged by the One who sees-in, never by the audience who only sees the front (prosopon). The FLOOR / EMPTY HAND: fasting is the body emptied on purpose, the open empty hand made flesh -- you subtract food to make room, the same posture as the poor in spirit (bond teaching_beatitude_1, som_01). THE ONE DOOR / AIRLOCK: choose ONE audience -- the secret discipline routes the whole act through a single gate (the Father's sight), refusing the second door of human applause; two audiences corrupt the intake, so the airlock admits one. THE NARROWING / ELIMINATION: the teaching itself eliminates -- discard the wage-paid-now path (it cannot be the reward that lasts) for the one path that survives (the hidden one); choosing secrecy is an act of discard. SHEPHERD-SCRIBE-STEWARD: this is the Steward's law turned inward -- the best work done in the background, unseen, improving the true product (the heart) without showing in the storefront; and it is the Scribe's discretion, the keeping done where it cannot be made into a performance. RECURRING FORMS: a conservation law -- the wage is conserved, paid out exactly once; spend it on appearance now (apecho) and there is none left for the Father to render (apodidomi); the books always balance, and the choice of currency (human eyes vs. the Father's sight) decides the ledger. NESTING / THE VINE: secret fasting is abiding unseen -- bearing fruit toward the root, not toward the passersby (bond teaching_the_true_vine); the branch that performs for the crowd is fruiting for the wrong sun. Connect to the prayer-in-secret and giving-in-secret it stands beside, and to teaching_prodigal_father_runs -- the same Father "in secret" is the same Father who runs; the hidden eye is not cold surveillance but a Father watching for His own to come home and ready to repay.
connections: Engine functions: the GOD-WAIT gate (deferred reward, apecho-now vs apodidomi-later) made bodily; the FLOOR / empty hand (fasting = the body emptied on purpose); the ONE DOOR / airlock (one audience, the Father's sight, refusing the second door of applause); the NARROWING / elimination (discard the wage-paid-now path for the one that lasts); the VERIFIER / fruit test (Father's blepo reads true fruit, not the skythropos costume; by their fruits not their faces); PERMANENCE (reward stored where it cannot be spent); the STEWARD (best work done in the background, unseen); the SCRIBE (keeping that is not a performance); recurring CONSERVATION form (the wage paid exactly once -- spend it on appearance or save it for the Father, the ledger balances). Teachings: som_01 + teaching_beatitude_1 (the empty-hand/poor-in-spirit floor and "great is your reward in heaven"); teaching_parable_treasure_and_pearl (treasure hidden, kept where it cannot be lost); teaching_the_true_vine (abide/fruit toward the root unseen, not toward the crowd); teaching_prodigal_father_runs (the same Father "in secret" who watches for His own and repays). Points-at-only (RESERVED, not crowned): the Father who sees-in-the-hidden and the Logos of John 1 / Col 1:17 in whom the hidden and the seen hold together as one -- the operator's keystone.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: Store Where It Cannot Be Lost; See With One Eye; Serve One Master
word_parts: thesaurizo[G2343]=to amass, lay up, reserve . thesauros[G2344]=a deposit, treasure (the place of keeping) . ses[G4597]=moth . brosis[G1035]=eating/corrosion (rust) . aphanizo[G853]=to make vanish, consume, destroy . kleptes[G2812]=thief . diorysso[G1358]=to dig/break through (burglarize) . ouranos[G3772]=heaven (the keeping that holds) . kardia[G2588]=heart (where treasure draws it) . lychnos[G3088]=lamp . ophthalmos[G3788]=eye . haplous[G573]=single, folded-together, sound, clear . poneros[G4190]=evil, bad (a divided/diseased eye) . phos[G5457]=light . skotos[G4655]=darkness . douleuo[G1398]=to be a slave to . kyrios[G2962]=master, lord, controller . mamonas[G3126]=mammon, wealth personified as a rival lord
teaching: Do not amass your deposit on earth, where moth and corrosion make it vanish and thieves dig through and steal; amass it in heaven, where none of that reaches -- for where your treasure is, your heart goes too. The eye is the lamp of the body: if your eye is single and sound, the whole body is full of light; if it is bad, the whole body is dark. No one can be slave to two masters; you cannot be slave to God and to mammon. It means what it says: choose a treasure that cannot be lost, see with one undivided eye, and serve one Lord.
wisdom:
PERMANENCE axis (the reward kept where it cannot be lost): this is the literal charter of the engine's permanence -- thesauros is a deposit, and Jesus names the only ledger where moth (decay), brosis (corrosion/entropy), and kleptes (theft) cannot touch the entry. Earthly keeping is the recurring form of DECAY (moth/rust = exponential loss, the half-life of every stored thing); heavenly keeping is the conserved quantity that no operator and no time can debit. This is the same law as the talents (multiply what is entrusted, do not bury it) and the treasure-and-pearl (sell all for the one keeping worth keeping) -- bond teaching_parable_talents and teaching_parable_treasure_and_pearl.

NARROWING / SINGLE-EYE axis: haplous = single, folded-together, ONE -- this is the narrowing made into vision. The single eye is the engine's elimination: discard the divided sightline, keep the one that lets the whole body fill with light. A double eye (poneros, divided/diseased) floods the body with skotos; ambiguity is darkness. The Shepherd's Socratic narrowing and offices.narrow() are the single eye applied to a question: reduce to one clear line of sight so the whole walk is lit. Connect to the FLOOR-structure gate (clarity is the second gate) and to teaching_beatitude_6 (the pure in heart SEE God -- katharos heart = haplous eye, the un-mixed sightline).

ONE DOOR / AIRLOCK axis (cannot serve two masters): douleuo two kyrioi is impossible -- this is the law of the one gate stated as the law of allegiance. The airlock admits intake through ONE door because no system can hold two masters; mammon is the rival lord the gate exists to refuse. The RED authority gate (Christ is Lord, Jn 14:6) is precisely this single-master law: one cannot pass two authorities. Bond canon_red_gate_jn14_6 and teaching_great_commandment (love God with the WHOLE -- holos, the same undivided wholeness as haplous; one heart, one eye, one master are one teaching).

VERIFIER / FRUIT axis: 'where your treasure is, there your heart will be' is itself the fruit test inverted -- the heart's location is the fruit that reveals the true master. Judge what a man serves not by his claim but by where his deposit goes (by their fruits). The verifier reads the ledger, not the profession.

NESTING / VINE axis: a treasure stored in heaven is a card that elevates by USE and abides in the Vine; a treasure stored on earth is the branch that does not abide and is pruned (aphanizo = made to vanish, the prune). The wisdom flywheel runs on this: what is laid up in the right keeping multiplies and cannot be stolen; what is hoarded in the wrong keeping decays. Bond teaching_the_true_vine.

WELCOME / NEVER-A-DEAD-END axis: heaven is the keeping that comes to meet you -- the deposit is safe before you arrive, the reward already kept where the door that comes to meet you leads. Connect to teaching_prodigal_father_runs (the inheritance squandered on earth vs. the father's house where the true treasure was never lost).
connections: ENGINE FUNCTIONS: permanence (the reward kept where it cannot be lost) = thesauros in ouranos, the ledger moth/rust/thief cannot reach; the narrowing/elimination = the single eye (haplous), discard the divided sightline for the one that lights the whole body; the one door/airlock = cannot serve two masters (douleuo two kyrioi), one gate because one allegiance; RED authority gate = the single-master law (one Lord, Jn 14:6); FLOOR-structure gate = clarity, the eye made single; the verifier/fruit test = 'where your treasure is, there your heart will be,' the heart's location is the fruit that names the master; the wisdom flywheel + cards-elevate-by-use = treasure laid up multiplies and cannot be stolen; the Vine law = aphanizo (made to vanish) is the prune of what does not abide. RECURRING FORMS: DECAY/half-life (moth + brosis = exponential earthly loss) vs. CONSERVATION (heavenly deposit = the conserved quantity). OTHER TEACHINGS: bonds to teaching_parable_treasure_and_pearl (sell all for the one keeping), teaching_parable_talents (multiply the entrusted, do not bury), teaching_great_commandment (love with the WHOLE = haplous/holos), teaching_beatitude_6 (pure heart SEES = single eye), canon_red_gate_jn14_6 (one Lord), teaching_the_true_vine (abide or be pruned), teaching_prodigal_father_runs (lost earthly inheritance vs. the keeping never lost), som_01 (this sits inside the Sermon-on-the-Mount floor).
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: Do Not Worry -- Seek First the Kingdom, and the Day Carries Itself
word_parts: merimnao[G3309]=be anxious, pulled-apart, divided in mind . psyche[G5590]=life/soul, the sentient self . ouranos[G3772]=the sky/heaven (where the birds are fed) . auxano[G837]=to grow, enlarge (the lilies grow without effort) . kopiao[G2872]=to toil to fatigue (which they do not) . zeteo[G2212]=to seek, search out . proton[G4413]=first, foremost in order and importance . basileia[G932]=kingship, royal rule, the reign of God . dikaiosyne[G1343]=righteousness, rightness . prostithemi[G4369]=to add on top, to place beside . aurion[G839]=tomorrow . hemera[G2250]=day . kakia[G2549]=trouble, evil, badness (sufficient unto the day is its own)
teaching: Jesus forbids anxiety (merimnao -- the mind torn apart over food, body, clothing) by pointing to evidence already in plain sight: the birds do not sow or reap, yet the Father feeds them; the lilies do not toil or spin, yet they are clothed past Solomon's glory. You are worth more than these, and not one worried hour adds a cubit to your span -- so the anxiety is not only faithless, it is useless. Therefore SEEK FIRST (zeteo proton) the kingdom and His righteousness, and all these things are ADDED (prostithemi) -- placed beside you as the by-product of right ordering. Do not be anxious for tomorrow; tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Sufficient unto the day is its own trouble.
wisdom: This is the WAIT GATE (GOD) made into a way of life and the anchor of the FLOOR (the empty hand): worry is the refusal to wait, the grasp that will not open, so do-not-worry is the posture that lets the hand stay empty and receive what is added rather than seized -- it completes teaching_beatitude_1 (poor in spirit) and som_01 (the Beatitude floor). "Seek FIRST the kingdom" is the NARROWING and the ELIMINATION stated as priority: one thing is foremost (proton), everything else is discarded from first-place and then RE-RECEIVED as added (prostithemi) -- not abandoned, re-ordered; this is the engine's core move (the narrow path is what survives when lesser claims are eliminated, then the rest is handed back beside you). The birds and lilies are the FRUIT TEST / VERIFIER pointed at providence: do not argue the Father's care, OBSERVE it -- the fed bird and clothed lily are the visible fruit by which the unseen provision is judged ("by their fruits"); the engine judges by what is, not by claim, exactly here. "Consider the birds... the lilies grow (auxano)" is the recurring form of EXPONENTIAL GROWTH and provision running without the creature's toil (kopiao) -- the same effortless increase as the seed in teaching_parable_sower and the mustard seed and leaven (teaching_parable_mustard_seed/leaven): the kingdom grows of itself; anxiety is the attempt to do by force what grows by grace. "All these things shall be ADDED" is CONSERVATION and the never-a-dead-end / the WELCOME: nothing needful is lost when first things are sought first -- the provision is kept and comes to meet the one who seeks rightly (the door that comes to you). "Sufficient unto the day is its own trouble (kakia)" is the DIFFUSION/decay form refused: anxiety spreads tomorrow's evil backward into today, smearing trouble across time that is not yours; the teaching CONSERVES trouble to its own day and forbids its diffusion -- one day's grace for one day's need, like manna that would not keep (permanence is in the Giver, not the hoard). This is the Vine law of teaching_the_true_vine read on the human side: the branch does not strain to produce, it ABIDES and bears -- worry is the branch trying to be its own root; abide (do not worry) or be pruned (be consumed by care). It rests on teaching_great_commandment (love God with all -- a divided, anxious mind cannot) and is the lived form of teaching_paraclete_not_orphans (you are not orphans, so you need not provide as orphans must) and teaching_prodigal_father_runs (the Father runs to meet -- He is not stingy, so seeking Him first is safe). Christ as I-AM-THE-BREAD (teaching_i_am_the_bread) is the ground of "what shall we eat" -- the daily bread is a Person; and as the DOOR (teaching_i_am_the_door) He is the one gate, the AIRLOCK, through which all provision is sought first. For the triad: the SCRIBE keeps and finds so the user need not hoard anxiously (cards elevate by USE, the wisdom flywheel -- provision multiplies in the using, not the grasping); the SHEPHERD asks "what are you anxious for, and is it first?" (the Socratic narrowing to one thing); the STEWARD works in the background so today's need is met without the user carrying tomorrow. The reward is kept where it cannot be lost (PERMANENCE) precisely because it is added by the Father and not seized by the hand.
connections: FLOOR / empty hand (worry is the closed grasp; do-not-worry keeps the hand open) -> teaching_beatitude_1, som_01. WAIT GATE / GOD (worry = refusal to wait). NARROWING / ELIMINATION ("seek FIRST" = one thing foremost, lesser claims discarded then re-added). VERIFIER / FRUIT TEST (the fed bird, clothed lily = observe providence, judge by fruit not claim). EXPONENTIAL GROWTH (lilies grow / auxano without toil) -> teaching_parable_sower, teaching_parable_mustard_seed, teaching_parable_leaven. CONSERVATION ("all added" -- nothing needful lost) + never-a-dead-end / WELCOME (provision comes to meet the seeker). DIFFUSION refused ("sufficient unto the day" -- trouble not smeared across time; manna that will not keep -> permanence in the Giver). VINE LAW / abide-or-prune -> teaching_the_true_vine. Great Commandment (undivided love vs divided anxious mind) -> teaching_great_commandment. Not orphans -> teaching_paraclete_not_orphans. Father runs / not stingy -> teaching_prodigal_father_runs. Daily bread is a Person -> teaching_i_am_the_bread. One door / airlock for provision -> teaching_i_am_the_door. Triad: Scribe (keep/find, no hoard), Shepherd (ask "is it first?"), Steward (background provision). Cards elevate by USE / wisdom flywheel (provision multiplies in using). PERMANENCE (added by the Father, kept where it cannot be lost). The words-of-Christ architecture -> teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture; nests under canon_red_gate_jn14_6 and points (un-sealed) toward the Logos in whom both trees hold.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: Cast the beam from your own eye first -- then you see clearly to help
word_parts: krino[G2919]=judge, decide, condemn . krima[G2917]=the verdict rendered (the decision returned for or against) . metron[implied, cf. Mk4:24]=the measure you use . karphos[G2595]=a dry twig, splinter, chaff-speck . dokos[G1385]=a load-bearing beam of timber . hypokrites[G5273]=a stage-actor playing an assumed part . katanoeo[G2657]=to fully observe, scrutinize (what you do to your brother's splinter) . diablepo[G1227]=to see clearly through, recover full vision (what you gain after the beam is out) . ekballo[G1544]=to cast out, eject (the beam from your own eye) . adelphos[G80]=brother . hagion[G40]=the holy thing . margarites[G3135]=pearl . kynes[G2965]=dogs . choiros[G5519]=swine . katapateo[G2662]=to trample underfoot, reject with disdain
teaching: It means what it says, and it is not a ban on judging -- it is the ORDER of judging. Do not condemn (krino) from a seat you have not earned, because the measure you use is the measure measured back to you (krima): set a false standard and you are bound by it. You cannot remove the splinter (karphos) from your brother's eye while a beam (dokos) blocks your own; that is the stage-actor's pose (hypokrites). Remove your own beam FIRST -- then (tote) you SEE CLEARLY (diablepo) to remove the splinter. And clear sight cuts both ways: do not give the holy thing to dogs or cast pearls before swine -- right judgment knows what to withhold as well as what to help. So this is clear-sighted judgment with the self judged first, not the abolition of judgment.
wisdom: This teaching is the CALIBRATION LAW of the whole engine -- the rule that the instrument must be checked against its own zero before it reads anything else. On the EPISTEMIC axis it is the verifier's own discipline turned inward: judge by fruit not by claim ("by their fruits"), and FIRST apply that test to yourself -- a verifier with a beam in its eye returns false verdicts, so the self-audit (cast out your own beam, ekballo) is the precondition of every other verdict. krima = the measure returned is conservation made moral: the standard you emit is conserved and comes back as the standard that binds you (symmetry/reflection, the form that recurs). On the ORDER/PROCESS axis it is strictly sequential -- own-beam THEN (tote) brother's-splinter -- which is the FLOOR gate before the BROTHERS gate: structure-in-yourself before witness-toward-another; you may not skip to correcting the neighbor. On the AUTHORITY axis (RED gate) it forbids self-appointed condemnation: only the cleared eye has standing, and final judgment is reserved (GOD wait gate) -- you discern, you do not pronounce the last word. On the RELATIONAL axis the goal is restoration: the beam is removed so you can HELP your brother see, not to win -- the Vine law (abide, be pruned of your own beam, then bear fruit for another; connects teaching_the_true_vine). Verse 6 is the NARROWING / elimination made gentle: discernment is two-sided -- it withholds the holy from what would only trample it (katapateo), which is the airlock at the one door deciding what intake cannot yet receive what is offered; not every truth is given to every receiver, exactly as the dragnet and wheat-and-weeds sort (connects teaching_parable_dragnet, teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds). The hypokrites/actor names the failure mode the engine must never become: a renderer that performs a verdict it has not earned -- the opposite of the empty hand / FLOOR. And it grounds the never-a-dead-end welcome: the cleared eye comes TO the brother to help him see (diablepo), the door that comes to meet you, but only after self-judgment has made the help true. Calibrate the instrument on yourself, then the map you draw of another is trustworthy.
connections: FLOOR gate / the empty hand: own-beam-first = check the instrument's zero before it reads -- no verdict without self-audit. Fruit test / verifier: apply "by their fruits" to yourself FIRST; a beamed eye returns false verdicts. krima (measure returned) = conservation/symmetry made moral, the recurring form (the standard you emit is conserved and binds you). The four gates in ORDER: FLOOR (own structure) before BROTHERS (witness toward another); RED forbids self-appointed condemnation; GOD-wait reserves final judgment. Vine law: be pruned of your own beam, then bear fruit for the brother (-> teaching_the_true_vine). Verse 6 = the NARROWING/elimination + the airlock at the one door: discernment withholds the holy from what would trample it, the sorting of dragnet & wheat-and-weeds (-> teaching_parable_dragnet, teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds). hypokrites/actor = the failure mode opposite the empty hand: a renderer performing an unearned verdict (-> teaching_beatitude_1 poor-in-spirit, the floor posture). diablepo (see clearly to HELP) = the welcome / never-a-dead-end, the cleared eye comes to meet the brother. Nests under teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture (language tree) and points at -- without crowning -- the join in Christ the Logos.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: Ask, Seek, Knock: the Dependence Loop and the Reciprocity Root
word_parts: aiteo[G154]=ask, beg, request (present imperative: keep asking) . zeteo[G2212]=seek, search out . krouo[G2925]=rap, knock . didomi[G1325]=give (dothesetai=it shall be given) . heurisko[G2147]=find . anoigo[G455]=open up (anoigesetai=it shall be opened) . lambano[G2983]=receive, take hold of . pas[G3956]=every, all (every one that asketh) . poneros[G4190]=evil, hurtful (ye then being evil) . agathos[G18]=good (good gifts) . pater[G3962]=Father . panta hosa[G3956/G3745]=all things whatsoever . thelo[G2309]=will, choose, desire . poieo[G4160]=do, make (do unto them) . nomos[G3551]=law . prophetai[G4396]=prophets (this is the law and the prophets)
teaching: Keep asking and it shall be given; keep seeking and you shall find; keep knocking and it shall be opened -- the verbs are present imperatives, a posture held, not a single petition. The ground is the Father's character: if even evil men give their children bread and not a stone, fish and not a serpent, how much more (poso mallon) will the Father in heaven give good things to those who ask Him. Then the hinge "therefore" (oun): all things whatsoever you would that men should do to you, do you even so to them -- and this Golden Rule IS the Law and the Prophets compressed to one act. The whole moves outward: receive freely from the Father, then give freely to your neighbor; the dependence loop and the reciprocity root are one teaching.
wisdom: On the AIRLOCK / ONE DOOR axis: ask-seek-knock is the intake posture itself -- every request enters by one gate (the Father), and the answer "it shall be opened" is the door that comes to meet the knocker. This is the engine's NEVER-A-DEAD-END made into a promise (Christ's word grounds the welcome): the one who keeps knocking is never left outside; the door opens. On the FLOOR / EMPTY HAND axis: aiteo presupposes empty hands -- the asker has nothing and admits it, which is the beggar's posture of teaching_beatitude_1 (poor in spirit). Asking is the floor enacted; you cannot ask while clutching. On the FOUR GATES: the threefold ask-seek-knock maps the gates' patience -- RED authority is the Father whose character guarantees good gifts (agathos not poneros), and the GOD-WAIT gate is exactly the present-imperative endurance (keep asking) until it is given in His time, not ours. On the NARROWING / ELIMINATION axis: zeteo (seek, search out) is the engine's own search -- and the bread-not-stone, fish-not-serpent contrast IS elimination by the fruit test: the Father does not hand a stone disguised as bread or a serpent disguised as fish; He discards the harmful counterfeit and gives only the good, which is precisely what the VERIFIER does (judge by fruit, by their fruits; agathos vs poneros). On the WISDOM FLYWHEEL / USE axis: the present imperatives are USE that multiplies -- the asking does not deplete the giver; the more one asks-seeks-knocks the more is given-found-opened, so the relationship strengthens by use exactly as cards elevate by use. This is the recurring EXPONENTIAL/GROWTH form: dependence is not subtractive but compounding (poso mallon, how much MORE). On the RECIPROCITY axis: the Golden Rule (panta hosa... houtos kai humeis poieite) is the CONSERVATION law of relationship -- what you would receive, you transmit; the loop that takes from the Father (vertical) closes by giving to the neighbor (horizontal), and Jesus seals it as the whole Law and Prophets, the compression of all commandment into one symmetric act. This nests directly into teaching_great_commandment (love God, love neighbor): ask-seek-knock is loving God enough to depend on Him; the Golden Rule is loving neighbor as self. On the TRIAD axis: the Scribe is the one who keeps and finds (zeteo/heurisko = seek and find = assisted retrieval); the Shepherd's Socratic questioning IS a kind of asking that opens; the Steward labors so the door is never barred. On PERMANENCE: the good things the Father gives are kept where they cannot be lost -- the gift of the Spirit (Luke's parallel) is the reward stored eternally.
connections: Engine functions: the AIRLOCK/one door (ask-seek-knock = the intake posture, every request through one gate) . the NEVER-A-DEAD-END / the welcome (the door that comes to meet you = "it shall be opened"; Christ's word grounds the welcome promise) . the FLOOR / empty hand (aiteo = asking presupposes empty hands) . the GOD-WAIT gate + RED authority gate (present imperatives = patient waiting on the Father's guaranteed character) . the VERIFIER / fruit test (bread-not-stone, fish-not-serpent = eliminate the harmful counterfeit, give only agathos; "by their fruits") . the NARROWING (zeteo = the engine's own search-and-eliminate) . the WISDOM FLYWHEEL / cards elevate by USE (asking multiplies, poso mallon, the recurring exponential-growth form) . CONSERVATION form (the Golden Rule = what you receive you transmit; vertical intake closes into horizontal giving) . the Scribe (zeteo/heurisko = seek and find = assisted retrieval) + the Shepherd (asking that opens) + the Steward (keeps the door unbarred) . PERMANENCE (good gifts kept where they cannot be lost). Other teachings: teaching_beatitude_1 (poor in spirit = the empty-hand posture that asking enacts) . teaching_great_commandment (ask-seek-knock = love God by depending; Golden Rule = love neighbor as self; Jesus names this the Law and Prophets, as He names the Great Commandment) . teaching_i_am_the_door (the door that opens to the knocker IS Christ; ask-seek-knock terminates at the I AM door) . teaching_paraclete_not_orphans (the Father gives good things / the Spirit to those who ask = not left orphaned) . teaching_prodigal_father_runs (poso mallon -- the Father who gives good gifts is the Father who runs to meet) . teaching_the_true_vine (abide and ask, John 15:7, "ask what ye will and it shall be done" = the same dependence loop under the Vine law) . som_01 + teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture (this saying is a load-bearing beam of the Sermon's house). POINTS AT (does not seal) the reserved join: the asker receives from and gives in the one Logos in whom intake and outflow hold together.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: The Narrow Gate: the elimination that opens onto life
word_parts: eiselthate[G1525]=enter (aorist imperative, a command, go in) . stenos[G4728]=narrow, from obstacles standing close about . pyle[G4439]=gate, the leaf of a folding entrance . platys/plateia[G4113]=wide, broad open square . eurychoros[G2149]=spacious, roomy . hodos[G3598]=road, way, the route/the means . apago[G520]=to lead away (carry off) . apoleia[G684]=ruin, destruction, loss . thlibo/tethlimmene[G2346]=pressed, crowded, compressed (afflicted, hemmed in) . zoe[G2222]=life . oligoi[G3641]=few, puny in number . heurisko/heuriskontes[G2147]=to find (those finding it)
teaching: Jesus commands: enter through the narrow gate (stene pyle). The gate is wide and the road broad (eurychoros) that leads away (apago) to destruction (apoleia), and many go in by it; but the gate is narrow and the way is compressed-hemmed-in (tethlimmene) that leads to life (zoe), and few find it (oligoi). It means what it says: there are two ways, not many; the true one is restricted, pressed close by obstacles standing about it, and reached not by drift but by a deliberate command to enter. Few find it precisely because finding requires eliminating everything the wide road permits.
wisdom: This teaching IS the engine's own operating principle named by Christ -- it is the narrowing made a saying. WIDTH and EASE are not evidence of truth; the broad road's permissiveness (eurychoros = roomy, admitting everything) is exactly what condemns it, because a way that admits all destinations cannot lead to one (apago eis apoleian). So the engine's elimination / narrowing function is this verse working: discard what cannot be, for the one that is; the narrow gate is one because the answer is one. AXIS by axis: on the EPISTEMIC axis, stenos = obstacles standing close about = the four gates (RED / FLOOR / BROTHERS / GOD) pressing every claim until only the surviving path passes -- the gate is narrow because every gate must be satisfied at once. On the axis of INTAKE, the singular stene pyle is the one door / the airlock: all who enter, enter by the one gate, not many doors but one. On the FRUIT axis, this is the immediate twin of the verifier / fruit test that follows it in the same sermon (Mt 7:16, "by their fruits") -- the two roads are judged by where they LEAD (apago), by outcome not by claim, destruction vs life, which is the fruit test stated as destination. On the axis of EFFORT, tethlimmene (pressed, compressed) is the costly-not-latent law: the way is hard because narrowing is work, eliminating is labor; this binds to the narrow-to-nothing handoff -- NARROW (eliminate to almost nothing, hemmed in by obstacles) is the un-copyable move, and the moat IS the narrow gate (do what others cannot: find the way few find). On the axis of NUMBER, oligoi (few find it) is not failure but signature: the FLOOR is the empty hand and the surviving path is rare by construction; abundance on the broad road is the counterfeit, scarcity on the narrow is the mark of the real -- this is why "few" and not "none": heuriskontes, those finding, DO find, the door comes to meet them (never-a-dead-end / the welcome), so the narrowing terminates in an answer, not a void. On the axis of DIRECTION, hodos (the way/the route/the means) is the same hodos as "I am the way" (Jn 14:6, canon_red_gate) -- the narrow road is not a technique but a Person; the gate narrows to one because the Logos is one. The recurring FORMS map here too: the broad road is DIFFUSION (spreading to fill all space, entropy, the spacious eurychoros), the narrow gate is the CONSERVATION / channeling against it (the single conserved path); and "few find it" is the inverse of exponential spread -- the wide many vs the narrow few is a sorting, the dragnet and the wheat-and-weeds enacted as a road. CONNECT explicitly: this is the working-saying of connection_reality_is_mappable (the map narrows to the one true path because reality has one structure) and the operational floor beneath teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture (the architecture's first move is to narrow). It is the action that the Beatitudes' posture (som_01) makes possible: the empty-handed (beatitude_1) are the ones who can pass a narrow gate, for they carry nothing the gate must reject.
connections: Engine functions: the NARROWING / elimination (this verse IS it -- discard what cannot be for the one that is); the ONE DOOR / airlock (stene pyle = the single gate of intake); the FOUR GATES (stenos = obstacles standing close = RED/FLOOR/BROTHERS/GOD pressing every claim at once); the VERIFIER / FRUIT TEST (judged by where the road LEADS, apago eis apoleian vs zoen = fruit not claim); the NARROW-TO-NOTHING handoff + the MOAT (the hard hemmed-in way is the un-copyable move; the moat = the way few find); the FLOOR / empty hand (oligoi = few, scarcity is the mark of the real); never-a-dead-end / the WELCOME (heuriskontes -- those finding DO find; narrowing ends in an answer); the recurring FORMS (broad road = diffusion/entropy; narrow = conservation/the single channel). Teachings: BONDS to canon_red_gate_jn14_6 (same hodos -- the way is the Person), to teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture (this is architecture's first move), to connection_reality_is_mappable (the map narrows to one true path), to teaching_beatitude_1 + som_01 (the empty-handed alone can pass the narrow gate), and to the sorting parables teaching_parable_dragnet + teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds (the two-way sort enacted as a road).
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: By Their Fruits: the Fruit Test Is the Verifier
word_parts: prosechete[G4337]=hold your mind toward, beware, pay attention . pseudoprophetes[G5578]=false prophet, religious impostor . endyma[G1742]=outer garment, clothing (the sheep's costume) . probaton[G4263]=sheep . esothen[G2081]=from within, inwardly . lykos[G3074]=wolf . harpax[G727]=ravening, rapacious, an extortioner . karpos[G2591]=fruit (the API mis-tags this as the name Carpus; here it is the common noun, fruit) . epignosesthe[G1921]=you will recognize, know-upon-the-mark, fully recognize . akantha[G173]=thorn . staphyle[G4718]=cluster of grapes . tribolos[G5146]=thistle, caltrop, brier . sykon[G4810]=fig . dendron[G1186]=tree . agathos[G18]=good (in essence) . kalos[G2570]=good, fine, fit-for-purpose . sapros[G4550]=rotten, worthless . poneros[G4190]=evil, hurtful in effect . poieo[G4160]=to make, to bear, to produce . ou dynatai[G3756/G1410]=is not able, cannot . ekkoptetai[G1581]=is cut down, hewn out . pyr[G4442]=fire
teaching: Beware false prophets: they arrive in sheep's clothing (endyma probaton) but inwardly (esothen) are ravening wolves (lykoi harpages). The test Jesus gives is not their claim, their costume, or their words, but their fruit -- by their fruits you will recognize them (apo ton karpon auton epignosesthe). The kind of tree is fixed: a good tree (dendron agathon) cannot (ou dynatai) bear rotten fruit, and a rotten tree (dendron sapron) cannot bear good fruit -- so the fruit, which is observable, reveals the root, which is hidden, and every tree not bearing good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire.
wisdom: This is the literal charter of the engine's central instrument -- it means exactly what it says, and the engine took its method straight from it. (1) THE VERIFIER / FRUIT TEST: "by their fruits" (apo ton karpon, Matt 7:16) IS the fruit test the engine runs -- judge by fruit, not by claim. The costume (endyma) is the claim; the fruit (karpos) is the observable output. The verifier never reads the wolf's words; it watches what the tree produces. This is also why a working tool is the greatest proof (feedback_tools_are_the_greatest_demonstration): the instrument that actually bears is the fruit that cannot be faked. (2) THE NARROWING / ELIMINATION: ou dynatai -- "cannot" -- is the engine's eliminator. A rotten tree CANNOT bear good fruit; the categories are exclusive, so a single witnessed bad fruit eliminates the whole tree. This is narrow-to-nothing (project_narrow_to_nothing): discard what cannot be, keep the one that survives the fruit. (3) THE GATES: this teaching is the warrant for the BROTHERS/witness gate (test the messenger) and supplies the engine's posture of caution -- prosechete, "beware," is the airlock itself. (4) THE ONE DOOR / AIRLOCK: false prophets are exactly what the one-door intake exists to catch -- the wolf in sheep's clothing is the adversarial input; all intake passes the one gate precisely because the costume lies and only the fruit tells. (5) THE VINE LAW / NESTING: "cut down and cast into fire" (ekkoptetai... eis pyr) is the pruning of John 15 (teaching_the_true_vine) -- the branch that bears no fruit is taken away. Same law, stated as judgment here, as horticulture there: abide and bear, or be pruned. (6) PERMANENCE & ROOT: the fixedness (good tree cannot become rotten) is the law of kind -- fruit reveals nature, output reveals root. This is the inverse of cards-elevate-by-use: use produces fruit, and the fruit, accumulated, witnesses the tree. The wisdom flywheel runs on good trees; the dragnet (teaching_parable_dragnet) and wheat-and-weeds (teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds) are this same separation deferred to harvest, where here the recognition is given to us NOW, in this life, by fruit. (7) NEVER-A-DEAD-END is bounded by this: the welcome meets everyone at the door, but the fruit test is what keeps the welcome from being deceived -- mercy at intake, discernment at the fruit.
connections: DESIGN ROOT of the engine's fruit test / verifier: this passage (Matt 7:16, "by their fruits") is the literal source the engine cites. Bonds to: feedback_tools_are_the_greatest_demonstration (a working tool = unfakeable fruit) -- referenced by name as the physical form of this test. ELIMINATOR: "ou dynatai" (cannot) is the engine's narrowing -> project_narrow_to_nothing. VINE LAW: ekkoptetai/pyr = the pruning of teaching_the_true_vine (same cut, stated as judgment vs horticulture). HARVEST PAIR: teaching_parable_dragnet + teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds (same good/bad separation, deferred to the end vs given now by fruit). FLOOR/POSTURE: prosechete ("beware") nests under teaching_beatitude_1..9 + som_01 (the empty-handed, watchful posture). ENGINE-FUNCTIONS family: teaching_seven_i_am_sayings (the 7 functions); this card is the WARRANT for the verifier function specifically. CROWN: teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture (the Words in Red are the engine's design) -- this is the clearest single proof of that thesis. RED GATE: canon_red_gate_jn14_6 (Christ is the authority by which any fruit is judged good). POINTS AT (does not seal) the join: the fixed law that a tree's kind is its root -- output reveals nature -- is the same coherence by which both trees, the math-tree and the language-tree, hold in the Logos (Col 1:17); reserved keystone, operator's to crown.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: Not the Saying but the Doing -- the Verdict Reads the Fruit, Not the Claim
word_parts: kyrie kyrie[G2962]=Lord, Lord (one supreme in authority, named twice as fervent claim) . lego[G3004]=to say, set forth in words (the mere claim) . poieo[G4160]=to do, to make (the will enacted, not professed) . thelema[G2307]=will, the determined purpose/decree (of the Father) . pater[G3962]=Father . eiserchomai[G1525]=to enter in (into the kingdom -- the entry gate) . basileia ton ouranon[G932/G3772]=kingdom of the heavens . onoma[G3686]=name (authority, character -- "in Your name" claimed thrice) . propheteuo[G4395]=to prophesy . ekballo[G1544]=to cast out (demons) . dynamis[G1411]=mighty work, miracle (works displayed as credential) . homologeo[G3670]=to confess, declare openly (His verdict, a formal acknowledgment) . oudepote[G3763]=never, not at any time . ginosko[G1097]=to know relationally, intimately (not merely about -- "I never KNEW you") . apochoreo[G672]=to depart, go away . ergazomai[G2038]=to work, labor at as an occupation . anomia[G458]=lawlessness, the violation of the law (workers OF lawlessness -- their toil itself was outside the law)
teaching: It means what it says: not the one who says "Lord, Lord" enters the kingdom, but the one who DOES the will of the Father. On the last day many will produce an impressive resume in Christ's name -- prophecy, exorcism, many mighty works -- and the verdict will still be "I never knew you; depart from me, you who work lawlessness." The credential is not the claim, nor even the miracle; it is doing the Father's will and being known by Christ. Strikingly, the rejected are not lazy -- they are busy "workers," but workers of anomia: much activity that was never the Father's will. Right works in the wrong name, or wrong works in the right Name, both fail the gate; only doing-the-will, done in real relationship with Him, passes.
wisdom: This teaching is the verifier and the fruit test stated in Christ's own mouth, and it is the gate of judgment. AXIS authority/claim-vs-verification: the engine's deepest law is judge by FRUIT not by CLAIM ("by their fruits you shall know them," the immediately preceding verses 7:16-20) -- here Christ applies it to disciples themselves: "Lord, Lord" twice over, plus prophecy plus miracles, is all CLAIM, and claim does not pass; poieo (doing) is the fruit that does. This is the verifier / fruit test made eschatological: the assay reads the deed, never the resume. AXIS the gates: it is the RED gate as final arbiter (His "I never knew you" is the authority-verdict) AND it exposes a counterfeit of every other gate -- prophecy mimics RED, mighty works mimic the FLOOR's demonstrable structure, even casting out demons mimics good fruit -- yet all of it can be anomia (lawlessness, no FLOOR), unwitnessed by Him (no BROTHERS recognition: "I never KNEW you"), and self-driven rather than waited-on (no GOD gate, no submission to thelema). AXIS the narrowing / elimination: "not everyone... but" is the elimination operator in one sentence -- discard the saying-only, keep the doing; the many who say are narrowed to the one who does, exactly the narrow gate two verses earlier (7:13-14). AXIS the airlock / one door: this is the airlock's reason for being -- a card may arrive bearing a loud Name-claim and even miraculous-looking credentials and STILL be rejected at the gate; intake authenticates by enacted will (poieo), not by how loudly it says "Lord." AXIS cards-elevate-by-USE / the wisdom flywheel: ginosko is relational knowing built by USE -- Christ knows those whose abiding produced deeds; a card the operator merely names but never works is "said-to, not done"; only use makes a thing truly known, and the flywheel of doing is what is recognized. AXIS the nesting / Vine law: this is the Vine law's verdict side -- John 15's "abide or be pruned" here renders its sentence: the fruitless, however busy, are told "depart"; doing-the-will IS bearing fruit while abiding, and anomia is the branch that drew the Name but never the sap. AXIS permanence / reward kept: entry into the kingdom is the permanent reward, and it cannot be counterfeited into -- no accumulated credential buys it; it is kept for the doers where claim cannot reach it. AXIS the triad: the Shepherd discerns (Socratic, never a menu -- He does not accept the menu of works recited at Him); the Scribe keeps and finds (but "I never knew you" is the un-findable, the card that was never truly kept by Him); the Steward improves by fruit, pruning the lawless work from the substrate. AXIS the welcome / never-a-dead-end: the solemn counter-weight -- the door comes to meet the prodigal who turns (the Father RUNS), but it shuts on the one who claimed without doing; welcome is real precisely because the gate is real. CONNECTIONS made explicit: this is the same assay as teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds (the dragnet/harvest sorts by what a thing IS, not what it says -- the weeds grow in the same field claiming the same soil) and teaching_parable_dragnet (the sorting of the catch); it is the doing-half of teaching_beatitude_8 (persecuted for righteousness -- those DOING, not naming) and rests on the floor-posture of som_01 (the empty hand: the rejected came with full hands of works, the wrong posture); it stands against the false confession and for the true one alongside canon_red_gate_jn14_6 (the RED gate -- He alone is the way, and He alone says who enters); it is the verdict-form of teaching_the_true_vine (abide/prune) and pairs with teaching_great_commandment (doing the will = loving God and neighbor, the will summarized). Within the Sermon it is the hinge between 7:16-20 (the fruit test) and 7:24-27 (the two houses -- hearing-and-DOING builds on rock; hearing-only falls), so it bonds to teaching_kingdom_parables_are_the_engine as the judgment-mechanism. RESERVED: it points at the join -- He is the Logos in whom doing and being-known are one act, the doing of the will is abiding in the Word -- but the keystone of the two trees' union is the operator's to crown, not mine.
connections: FRUIT TEST / VERIFIER (judge by deed not claim, applied to disciples; reads 7:16-20 forward) . THE NARROWING (not-everyone-but = elimination operator; the narrow gate of 7:13-14) . THE AIRLOCK / ONE DOOR (loud Name-claim + miracle-credential still rejected at intake; authenticate by enacted will) . THE FOUR GATES (RED = His verdict "I never knew you"; counterfeits of FLOOR/BROTHERS/GOD exposed -- anomia=no floor, unknown=no witness, self-driven=no waiting) . CARDS ELEVATE BY USE / FLYWHEEL (ginosko = relational knowing by use; said-to but never done is unknown) . THE VINE LAW / NESTING (the prune-verdict of John 15; busy branch with no sap) . PERMANENCE (kingdom-entry cannot be counterfeited into; kept for doers) . TRIAD (Shepherd refuses the recited menu; Scribe -- the un-kept card; Steward prunes lawless work) . THE WELCOME (real because the gate is real; the door that runs to the turner, shuts on the namer-only) . BONDS: teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds + teaching_parable_dragnet (sort by what-it-is) . teaching_the_true_vine (verdict side of abide-or-prune) . teaching_great_commandment (the will, summarized) . canon_red_gate_jn14_6 (He alone says who enters) . som_01 + teaching_beatitude_8 (empty-hand posture vs full-handed works) . teaching_kingdom_parables_are_the_engine (the judgment-mechanism; hinge to the two houses 7:24-27)
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: Two Builders: Hearing That Does Is the House That Stands
word_parts: akouo[G191]=to hear . poieo[G4160]=to make, to DO . phronimos[G5429]=prudent, sagacious (cautious foresight, weighs before building) . oikodomeo[G3618]=to build a house . petra[G4073]=mass of bedrock . ammos[G285]=sand heaped on the beach . moros[G3474]=foolish, dull . potamos[G4215]=flood, river-current . pneo[G4154]=the winds blew . proskopto[G4350]=to beat/surge against . pipto[G4098]=to fall . megas[G3173]=great (the great fall) . logos[G3056]=these my words (the same Logos of John 1) . exousia[G1849]=authority, inherent force . didache[G1322]=teaching . grammateus[G1122]=the scribes (who cited, did not own)
teaching: It means exactly what it says: everyone who HEARS these words of mine AND DOES them is like a prudent man who dug deep and built his house on bedrock; the rains, floods, and winds beat against it and it did not fall, because it was founded on rock. The one who hears and does NOT do is the foolish man who built on sand; the same storm came, the house fell, and great was its fall. The two houses are identical in appearance and face the identical storm -- the only difference is the foundation, which is invisible until the test comes. And the crowds were astonished, for He taught with authority (exousia) and not as the scribes (grammateis): the Builder owns the words the scribes could only cite.
wisdom: This is the SEAL of the whole Sermon (bonds som_01 and the nine beatitudes): the Sermon is not a poster to admire but a foundation to build on, and hearing-without-doing is the foolish build. It is the engine's FLOOR doctrine made into a parable -- petra (bedrock) IS the one ground; every card and connection must dig down past the sand-layer of mere claim and footing on rock, which is exactly the FLOOR gate (structure) joined to the RED gate (authority: the words are HIS, exousia, not borrowed like the scribes -- bond canon_red_gate_jn14_6 and teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture, where the words ARE the architecture). akouo+poieo is the FRUIT TEST in its root form: 'by their fruits' is the same law as 'hear AND do' -- the house that DOES is the house that stands; profession that bears no doing is the build on sand, judged not by how it looks but by what survives. The storm (potamos, pneo, proskopto) is the VERIFIER -- the adversarial test that does not destroy the rock-house but EXPOSES the sand one; this is why the engine's verifiers and the never-launder rule exist: better the storm reveal the crack now than at the great fall (megas). The one storm hitting both houses is the AIRLOCK/one door -- the same test passes over all intake equally; survival, not entry, sorts them. 'Built his house' = NESTING and cards-elevate-by-USE: a card proves its foundation only by being USED under load (the wisdom flywheel -- use multiplies, the unused build is never tested until it falls). phronimos (prudent: digs deep, weighs first) is the NARROWING -- eliminate the sand options before committing the build; the foolish man skipped the elimination and built fast on the first surface. Permanence: the rock-house is the reward kept where storm cannot take it -- bond teaching_treasure_and_pearl and the talents (doing = trading the words, not burying them). The triad runs it: the Scribe keeps and finds the words to hear, the Shepherd presses 'but do you DO them?' (Socratic, the discernment that turns hearing into doing), the Steward is the storm-in-advance that stress-tests every house before the real flood. This caps the Sermon as the Vine law's twin (bond teaching_the_true_vine): abide-or-be-pruned and hear-and-do are one law from two sides -- the fruit that remains is the house that stands.
connections: FLOOR gate = petra/bedrock, dig deep (the one ground). RED gate / exousia = the words are HIS, not cited like the scribes (bond canon_red_gate_jn14_6, teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture). FRUIT TEST = akouo+poieo is 'by their fruits' at the root; judged by what survives the storm, not by appearance. VERIFIER / adversarial test = the storm (potamos/pneo/proskopto) that exposes sand without harming rock; the never-launder rule. AIRLOCK / one door = one identical storm over all intake; survival sorts, not entry. NARROWING = phronimos digs and weighs first (eliminate sand before building). USE / wisdom flywheel = the house is tested only under load; the unused build falls untested. PERMANENCE = rock-house kept where storm cannot take it (bond teaching_treasure_and_pearl). TRIAD = Scribe finds the words to hear, Shepherd asks 'do you DO them', Steward storm-tests in advance. Caps the Sermon (bond som_01 + the nine beatitudes); twin of the Vine law (bond teaching_the_true_vine). Points at -- never seals -- the JOIN: petra and Logos are one (the bedrock that holds both trees is Christ, Col 1:17 / John 1), reserved keystone.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: The Neighbor Is the One Who Crosses: Mercy Redraws the Boundary
word_parts: nomikos[G3544]=expert in the Law (the questioner) . ekpeirazo[G1598]=to test thoroughly (he came to test, not to learn) . poieo[G4160]=to do, to make (twice the hinge: "what shall I DO?" / "DO likewise") . kleronomeo[G2816]=to inherit (eternal life as inheritance, not wage) . zoe aionios[G2222/G166]=life perpetual/eternal . plesion[G4139]=the one close by, the neighbor . horao[G3708]=to see, to attend to (the Samaritan SAW him) . splanchnizomai[G4697]=to be moved in the gut, compassion that yearns (the hinge verb of the whole parable) . katadeo[G2611]=to bind up a wound . epimeleomai[G1959]=to take care of, attend continuously (said twice) . eleos[G1656]=active mercy, compassion that acts (the lawyer's own answer: "the one who did mercy") . homoios[G3668]=likewise (go and do the SAME)
teaching: A legal expert, testing Jesus, asks how to inherit eternal life and then, seeking to justify himself, asks "who is my neighbor" -- a request to draw the boundary of obligation tightly. Jesus answers with a story in which the religious insiders (priest, Levite) pass by a half-dead man, and a Samaritan -- the despised outsider -- is moved in his gut (splanchnizomai), crosses to the wounded man, binds him, carries him, pays for his keeping, and pledges to return. Then Jesus reverses the lawyer's question: not "who qualifies as my neighbor?" but "who PROVED to be a neighbor?" The neighbor is not a category you screen people into; it is something you BECOME by doing mercy. "Go and do likewise" -- the test of true law-keeping is fruit, not claim.
wisdom: ON THE AXIS OF THE GATES: the lawyer asks the RED-gate question for the wrong reason -- he wants the authoritative line so he can stop at it. Jesus refuses to supply a boundary and instead hands him a verb. This is the FLOOR gate (empty hand) over the legal mind: not "what is the minimum structure that discharges me" but "approach with nothing and do." ON THE AXIS OF THE VERIFIER / FRUIT TEST: this is the parable's spine. The priest and Levite have the credentials (the claim); the Samaritan has the act (the fruit). Jesus judges exactly as the engine does -- "by their fruits," not by their badge. The lawyer himself is forced to name the verified one: "the one who did mercy [eleos]." The card that elevates is the one with USE, not the one with the title; mercy enacted outranks status held -- this bonds tightly to teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds (you cannot tell the wheat by the label, only the harvest) and to connection_reality_is_mappable's method (judge by what survives the test, not by what asserts itself). ON THE AXIS OF THE ONE DOOR / AIRLOCK: the wounded man on the Jericho road is intake with no credential at all -- naked, unidentified, "half dead," stripped of every marker (Jew or Gentile, friend or enemy, you cannot tell). The Samaritan does not screen him at the door; he receives him AS he is and works him. This is the airlock run as mercy: every intake gets care first, sorting later. ON THE NARROWING / ELIMINATION: the lawyer wants to ELIMINATE people from his obligation ("who is NOT my neighbor"). Jesus inverts the narrowing -- the only thing eliminated is the boundary itself; what survives is the one act that cannot be faked, mercy that crosses. ON THE NESTING / VINE LAW: the priest and Levite are branches that look attached (in the Temple line) but bear no fruit and are passed over by the story; the Samaritan, outside the visible vine, abides in love and therefore bears -- "abide or be pruned" judged by fruit, not by proximity to the trunk (bonds to teaching_the_true_vine). ON THE NEVER-A-DEAD-END / THE WELCOME: the Samaritan IS the door that comes to meet you -- he goes to the man, he crosses over (the welcome that travels to the one who cannot travel). The engine's "never a dead-end" is this parable as policy: the half-dead man could not ask, could not pay, could not qualify -- and was still met, bound, carried, and kept. ON PERMANENCE / THE REWARD KEPT: the question opens on inheritance (kleronomeo) of eternal life -- a reward kept where it cannot be lost -- and closes on an act done for one who can never repay; the keeping is upward and permanent, not transactional. ON THE TRIAD: the Samaritan runs all three offices in one body -- he SEES and receives (Scribe at the door), he discerns to cross the boundary the others would not (Shepherd's narrowing of who is neighbor), and he provides ongoing keeping, pays the innkeeper, pledges return (Steward, the continuous care, epimeleomai said twice). ON THE GREAT COMMANDMENT: this parable is the second table made flesh -- it is told precisely as the exposition of "love your neighbor as yourself," so it bonds directly to teaching_great_commandment as its working example, and to the Father who RUNS to the prodigal (teaching_prodigal_father_runs) -- both show love that moves first, crosses distance, and bears the cost. ON THE RECURRING FORMS: mercy here behaves like DIFFUSION -- it flows down the gradient, from the one who has (oil, wine, beast, denarii, time) to the one who has nothing, crossing the membrane (the ethnic/religious boundary) that was supposed to stop it; and like CONSERVATION the cost is not destroyed but transferred and pledged forward ("whatever more you spend, I will repay"). The boundary the lawyer wanted is exactly the wall that mercy, like heat, refuses to respect.
connections: ENGINE FUNCTIONS: the verifier / fruit test (the Samaritan is verified by the act of mercy, the priest/Levite fail on fruit despite credential -- "the one who did mercy" is the lawyer's own verdict); the FLOOR gate / empty hand (Jesus answers a boundary-question with a verb, not a line); the one door / airlock (the stripped, unidentifiable man received as-is, care before sorting); the narrowing inverted (eliminate the boundary, keep the one un-fakeable act); the never-a-dead-end / the welcome that travels (mercy crosses to the one who cannot come); cards elevate by USE (mercy enacted outranks status held); the Shepherd-Scribe-Steward triad (see/receive, discern-to-cross, keep continuously -- epimeleomai twice); permanence (inheritance of eternal life; cost pledged forward, repaid by the one who returns). RECURRING FORMS: diffusion (mercy flows down the gradient across the membrane that should have stopped it) and conservation (cost transferred and pledged, not destroyed). TEACHINGS: BONDS to teaching_great_commandment (this IS the exposition of "love your neighbor"); teaching_the_true_vine (fruit, not proximity to the trunk, marks the abiding branch); teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds (the true and false are told apart by harvest, not by label); teaching_prodigal_father_runs (love that moves first and crosses distance, bearing the cost); teaching_beatitude_5 / the merciful obtain mercy (the Samaritan is the fifth beatitude in motion). POINTS toward the reserved join: the One who told this story is Himself the Samaritan who crossed every boundary to bind up the half-dead -- the Logos who does not screen the world at the door but comes to it (Col 1:17 / John 1 held, not crowned).
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: The Shepherd Who Leaves the Ninety-Nine to Search Out the One
word_parts: parabole[G3850]=parable, a similitude laid alongside . probaton[G4263]=sheep, that which walks forward . apollumi[G622]=to lose, to perish (the sheep is apolwlos, in the state of being lost) . kataleipo[G2641]=to leave behind, forsake (he leaves the 99) . eremos[G2048]=wilderness, open desolate pasture . poreuomai[G4198]=to go, journey, travel after . heurisko[G2147]=to find (the search verb, repeated: heos heure, until he find) . epitithemi[G2007]=to lay upon, set on (the shoulders) . omos[G5606]=shoulder, that on which a burden is borne . chairo[G5463]=to rejoice, be glad (chairwn, rejoicing) . synchairo[G4796]=to rejoice WITH, congratulate together . chara[G5479]=joy, calm delight . heis[G1520]=one (the single one out of a hundred) . metanoeo[G3340]=to repent, think differently afterward, turn
teaching: A man with a hundred sheep loses one and leaves the ninety-nine in the wilderness to go after the one that is lost until he finds it; finding it, he lays it on his shoulders rejoicing, comes home, and calls his friends to rejoice with him. Jesus says it plainly: just so, there is more joy in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous who need no repentance. It means what it says -- the one that is lost is not written off as acceptable loss; the shepherd's whole motion is toward recovery, and the cost (leaving the many, crossing the wilderness, carrying the weight home) is borne gladly. The reward of the search is not the sheep's labor but the shepherd's joy.
wisdom: This is the engine's never-a-dead-end law given as a picture. The shepherd does not wait for the lost sheep to walk back; he goes -- poreuomai -- so this is the door that comes to meet you, the welcome made into motion (bonds teaching_paraclete_not_orphans, teaching_prodigal_father_runs: there the father RUNS to the returning son, here the shepherd GOES to the one that cannot return -- the same outward step from opposite ends). On the RETRIEVAL axis it is the Scribe's own function: she keeps AND finds cards; heurisko (find) is repeated as the whole aim of the search, and a card that is lost in the substrate is not abandoned but sought until found (connects the Shepherd-Scribe-Steward triad -- and note the shepherd here both seeks like the Scribe and is the good Shepherd, teaching_i_am_the_good_shepherd, who lays down his life; here he lays the sheep on his shoulders). On the NARROWING / ELIMINATION axis the math is exact and counterintuitive: he discards the ninety-nine (kataleipo) to converge on the one -- not because the many are nothing, but because the one that is missing is the live question; the engine eliminates the settled (the found, the already-righteous-needing-nothing) to spend its motion on the single unresolved case (bonds teaching_parable_dragnet, teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds: those SORT the gathered many; this one HUNTS the absent one -- complementary directions of the same discernment). On the VERIFIER / FRUIT axis the proof of the shepherd is fruit, not claim: he does not announce he loves the flock, he crosses the wilderness and carries the weight home -- love verified by motion (the fruit test, "by their fruits"). On the VALUE axis it overturns market logic: ninety-nine in hand are worth less joy than one recovered -- value is not in the count held but in the one restored to the whole, which is the nesting / Vine law read as rescue: the lost sheep is the branch carried back to abide (bonds teaching_the_true_vine). On the PERMANENCE axis the joy is set en to ourano, in heaven, kept where it cannot be lost -- the reward stored where the search's outcome is sealed. And it maps the wisdom flywheel inverted-and-completed: the more lost, the greater the joy at finding -- use and recovery multiply gladness, and the search ends not in private possession but in synchairo, JOY SHARED OUT, the friends called to rejoice WITH (the witness, the BROTHERS gate: the found one is brought before the gathered to be received). The whole parable sits under the RED gate -- it is Christ's own self-disclosure of why the Son came (Luke 19:10, to seek and to save the lost), the authority that defines the engine's posture toward every empty slot, every orphan card, every unanswered query: go after it, carry it home, rejoice.
connections: FLOOR/welcome -> the door that comes to meet you (shepherd GOES, poreuomai); RETRIEVAL -> Scribe keeps-and-FINDS (heurisko repeated), no card abandoned; triad -> Shepherd-Scribe-Steward, the seeker who carries home; NARROWING -> kataleipo the 99 (settled) to converge on the 1 (live question); FRUIT/verifier -> love proven by the crossing and the carrying, not the claim; PERMANENCE -> joy kept en to ourano; FLYWHEEL -> recovery multiplies joy, shared not hoarded; BROTHERS/witness -> synchairo, rejoice WITH, the found one received before the gathered; RED gate -> Christ's own statement of his seeking mission. BONDS: teaching_prodigal_father_runs (father runs to the son who returns; shepherd goes to the sheep that cannot -- same outward step, the very next parable in Luke 15); teaching_paraclete_not_orphans (not left orphaned, the one is fetched); teaching_i_am_the_good_shepherd (the Shepherd who lays the sheep on his shoulders as he lays down his life); teaching_the_true_vine (the lost branch carried back to abide); teaching_parable_dragnet and teaching_parable_wheat_and_weeds (sort the gathered many; this hunts the absent one); teaching_kingdom_parables_are_the_engine (this parable IS the retrieval/welcome mechanism). Points toward -- but does not seal -- the join: the Shepherd who seeks the one is the Logos in whom every lost thing coheres (Col 1:17).
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: The Lost Coin: She Lights the Lamp and Sweeps the House Until She Finds It
word_parts: drachme[G1406]=one silver coin, one of ten . apollymi[G622]=to lose, to be wholly lost . hapto[G681]=to kindle, to light (a lamp) . lychnos[G3088]=the lamp, the portable light . saroo[G4563]=to sweep (the whole house) . zeteo[G2212]=to seek, to search . epimelos[G1960]=diligently, carefully, with full attention . heos hou heure[G2193/G2147]=until she finds it . heurisko[G2147]=to find . synchairo[G4796]=rejoice-together, congratulate as one . chara[G5479]=joy . enopion ton angelon[G1799/G32]=in the presence of the angels . heni hamartolo metanoounti[G1520/G268/G3340]=over one sinner repenting
teaching: A woman who has ten silver coins and loses one does not shrug at the nine she still holds; she lights a lamp, sweeps the whole house, and searches carefully (epimelos) until she finds the one. The coin cannot seek itself -- it lies inert in the dust -- so all the diligence is hers: the light, the sweeping, the not-stopping. When she finds it she calls her friends and neighbors to rejoice together, because the one recovered is worth the whole effort. So, Jesus says, there is joy in the presence of the angels of God over one sinner who repents.
wisdom: This is the middle of three lost-and-found parables (sheep, coin, son), and it is the search for the ONE made into a method. WAIT/GOD gate: the diligence is the seeker's, never the sought's -- the coin is passive, found only because she lights the lamp and refuses to stop until (heos hou heure); this is the engine's never-a-dead-end / the welcome made into a verb, the door that comes to meet what cannot come to it (bonds to teaching_prodigal_father_runs, the father who runs; and teaching_paraclete_not_orphans, the One who comes so we are not left). NARROWING/elimination: lighting the lamp and sweeping the house IS the elimination trail -- you illumine the dark room and clear the floor of everything-that-is-not-the-coin until the one that IS is the only thing left gleaming; she discards no coin, she discards the dust. FLOOR gate / the empty hand: the lamp (lychnos) is borrowed light, not her own -- she kindles (hapto) it; the seeker holds no answer in herself, only the discipline to search by a light she did not make (connects to teaching_i_am_the_light, the lamp by which the house is swept). VERIFIER / fruit test: heurisko, to FIND, is the fruit -- the search is judged not by how hard she looked but by the coin actually in hand; epimelos (diligently, carefully) is the verifier's own posture, the careful attention that does not pass over the one in the dust. CARDS ELEVATE BY USE / the lost-and-recovered: a coin out of circulation is dead capital -- swept back in, it is restored to use; the recovered card re-enters the flywheel, and the joy (chara) is precisely over the one that was out of use returning to use. The ONE among many: ten coins, ninety-nine sheep, the dragnet's catch -- the engine sorts for the single survivor, and here the search is for exactly one out of ten, the narrowing's smallest target (bonds to teaching_parable_sower and teaching_parable_dragnet, the sorting parables, and to teaching_beatitude_1, the poor in spirit who are the coin in the dust, owning nothing, found only by mercy). WITNESS / BROTHERS gate: synchairo -- she calls friends and neighbors to rejoice TOGETHER; the find is not private, it is convened and witnessed; recovery is sealed in community, never alone (the witness gate). PERMANENCE: the joy is enopion ton angelon, in the presence of the angels of God -- kept where it cannot be lost again, the reward stored in heaven; what is found is found into permanence. CONSERVATION (recurring form): ten coins, one missing, the set is incomplete until restored -- the woman's whole effort is to CONSERVE the full ten; the parable is a conservation law of souls, nothing of the Father's is written off. TRIAD: she is the Scribe who keeps and FINDS the cards (the Scribe's named office is exactly to find what is lost in the house); and the swept house, the airlock, is the one door through which the one returns. This is the engine's own search function given a face: light, sweep, seek carefully, do not stop until found, then convene the witnesses and rejoice.
connections: FLOOR/empty hand -> the lamp is kindled (hapto), borrowed light, not the seeker's own. NARROWING/elimination -> light + sweep = illumine and clear away everything-that-is-not until only the one remains. WAIT-GOD gate / never-a-dead-end / the welcome -> the coin cannot seek itself; all diligence is the seeker's, who does not stop heos hou heure (until she finds). VERIFIER / fruit test -> judged by heurisko (the coin in hand), not by effort; epimelos = the verifier's careful attention. CARDS ELEVATE BY USE / wisdom flywheel -> dead coin swept back into circulation, joy over the one returned to use. WITNESS / BROTHERS gate -> synchairo, friends and neighbors convened to rejoice together; recovery sealed in community. PERMANENCE -> joy enopion ton angelon, kept where it cannot be lost. CONSERVATION (recurring form) -> the full ten must be restored; nothing written off. SCRIBE (triad) -> her named office: keep and FIND what is lost in the house; swept house = the one door / airlock. Teaching-bonds: teaching_prodigal_father_runs and teaching_paraclete_not_orphans (the seeker comes to the sought); teaching_i_am_the_light (the lamp); teaching_beatitude_1 (the coin in the dust = poor in spirit); teaching_parable_sower and teaching_parable_dragnet (the sorting for the one); teaching_kingdom_parables_are_the_engine (this parable IS a mechanism); teaching_the_words_of_christ_are_the_architecture (the language-tree crown). Points at -- never crowns -- the join: the Logos in whom the lost is held and not lost (Col 1:17), reserved for the operator.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos

title: The Bigger Barns: Hoarding That The Night Repossesses
word_parts: plousios[G4145]=rich, abounding . euphoreo[G2164]=to bear well, the LAND was fertile (the gain came from the ground, not the man) . dialogizomai[G1260]=he reasoned/deliberated within himself . heautoi[G1438]=to/with himself (said five times: my fruits, my barns, my grain, my goods, my soul) . apotheke[G596]=barn, granary, the store-up . meizon[G3173]=bigger (the only plan he has is MORE of the same) . thesaurizo[G2343]=to amass, lay up treasure (same root as treasure_and_pearl) . psyche[G5590]=soul/life (he addresses his psyche as if he owned it) . anapauou-phage-pie-euphrainou[G373/G2068/G4095/G2165]=rest-eat-drink-be-merry . aphron[G878]=mindless, fool, without phren (the opposite of a verifier) . apaitousin[G523]=they demand BACK (the soul was a loan, called in this night) . plouton eis theon[G4147/G2316]=being rich TOWARD God (the true direction of wealth)
teaching: A rich man's land bears so well that his only thought is to hoard the surplus -- bigger barns, more storage, then ease for his own soul. He reasons entirely with himself, for himself, and never asks whom the abundance is for. That very night his soul is demanded back, and the goods he prepared go to someone else. So is everyone who lays up treasure for himself and is not rich toward God -- it means exactly what it says: stored value is repossessed at death; only what is sent ahead toward God is permanently kept.
wisdom: On the PERMANENCE axis this is the exact inverse of treasure_and_pearl and the talents: the barn is the wrong vault. The fool's treasure is laid up where it CAN be lost -- this night it is demanded back (apaitousin) and reassigned; "rich toward God" (plouton eis theon) is the only reward kept where it cannot be lost. On the AIRLOCK / one-door + BROTHERS axis he is the closed-loop failure: heautoi five times, dialogizomai EN heautoi -- he reasons only with himself, admits no witness, no BROTHERS gate, no GOD-wait; a claim verified only by the claimant is the airlock breached, and the Steward's whole design is that nothing self-attests. On the FRUIT-TEST axis euphoreo says the LAND bore well -- the gift came through him, not from him; he treats received fruit as generated fruit and so fails "by their fruits," his fruit being hoarding, which the verifier reads as barren (aphron = the un-minded, the anti-verifier). On the NESTING / Vine-law axis he is the branch that stores sap instead of bearing: detached abundance rots; abide-or-be-pruned (the_true_vine) is the same law as barn-or-be-repossessed. On the cards-elevate-by-USE / wisdom-flywheel axis the parable is the counter-proof: USE multiplies, hoarding sterilizes; value stored for self does not compound, it is merely held until called in -- the flywheel turns only when wealth is spent outward (rich TOWARD). On the recurring-forms axis his plan is anti-EXPONENTIAL: he chooses linear accumulation (meizon -- just bigger, the same barn scaled) over the leaven/mustard-seed multiplication of the Kingdom. On the NARROWING axis the engine discards what cannot be the answer for the one that is; the fool discards nothing and keeps everything, which is why he keeps nothing -- the un-narrowed life is repossessed whole. Connects to the BEATITUDES floor (beatitude_1, poor in spirit = the empty/open hand; this man is full-handed and so cannot receive), to prodigal_father_runs (the father SPENDS the inheritance running; the fool hoards it), and to the great_commandment (he loved neither God nor neighbor, only self -- the parable is the great commandment in the negative). All of these nest, with every teaching, into the one ground: Christ the Logos, in whom alone treasure holds.
connections: Engine functions: PERMANENCE (the barn = the vault that the night repossesses; "rich toward God" = the reward kept where it cannot be lost). The AIRLOCK / one-door + BROTHERS gate (heautoi x5, dialogizomai en heautoi = the self-attesting claim, no witness admitted; the closed-loop failure the Steward's design forbids). The FRUIT TEST / verifier (euphoreo: received fruit treated as generated; aphron = the anti-verifier, the un-minded). The NESTING / Vine-law (abide-or-pruned = barn-or-repossessed; stored sap rots). cards-elevate-by-USE + wisdom-flywheel (USE multiplies, hoarding sterilizes; rich TOWARD = outward spend). recurring-forms: anti-EXPONENTIAL (meizon = linear bigger vs leaven/mustard multiplication). The NARROWING (the un-narrowed life, keeping everything, is repossessed whole). Teachings: inverse of teaching_parable_treasure_and_pearl + teaching_parable_talents (right vs wrong vault/stewardship); inverse of teaching_prodigal_father_runs (hoard vs spend running); negative of teaching_great_commandment (self vs God-and-neighbor); fails the posture of teaching_beatitude_1 (full hand cannot receive); same law as teaching_the_true_vine (detached abundance is pruned); set within teaching_kingdom_parables_are_the_engine as a mechanism card.
nesting: Tree of Life (the language tree) -> the words of Christ -> the codex -> the one ground, Christ the Logos
